frequency.shadow_desc: The chaotic scattering of energy; numbness born from overwhelming potential.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to channel pure creative fire into a singular, original act.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The radiant unity of all forms; the state where creation and creator are indistinguishable.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Body Electric. This is the raw spark of existence hitting the nervous system. It is not a thought; it is a physical pressure to mutate the silence. It feels like lightning trapped in a bottle—a high-voltage hum in the chest and solar plexus that demands kinetic release.
A.shadow_manifestation: Depressive Lethargy. When the voltage is too high, the fuses blow. You feel heavy, 'frozen,' or numb. You have infinite ideas but zero capacity to move a muscle. It is the paralysis of too much fuel.
A.micro_correction: Kinetic Discharge. Do not try to 'think' your way out. Stand up. Shake your hands and feet vigorously for 60 seconds. Disrupt the static field with chaotic movement.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Igniter. The impulse to shock others into awakening. You are not here to comfort the other; you are here to electrify them. It is the drive to lead a partner into new, uncharted territory simply to see what happens.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Bulldozer. Overwhelming others with unasked-for intensity. You burn bridges by forcing your timing onto people who are not ready for the voltage. Creating drama just to feel alive.
B.micro_correction: The Consent Check. Before unleashing your idea or energy, ask: 'Is this spark for me, or is it for us?' If they are not grounded, your lightning will only scorch them.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Abstract Synthesis. The mind operates like a fusion reactor, smashing disparate concepts together to create something entirely new. You do not think in lines; you think in explosions of insight.
C.shadow_manifestation: Melancholic Confusion. The inability to explain *how* you know what you know. You drown in a sea of data that makes sense to you but sounds like madness to others. Mental isolation.
C.micro_correction: The Art of Patience. Stop trying to translate the explosion immediately. Write the fragments down. Let the pattern emerge on its own time. Trust the chaos.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: Promethean Fire. The connection to the collective inspiration field. You act as a lightning rod for the zeitgeist, pulling down the 'next big thing' before humanity even knows it needs it.
D.shadow_manifestation: Delusion of Grandeur. Mistaking the channel for the source. Believing *you* are God, rather than a vessel for the divine spark. Disconnecting from consensus reality.
D.micro_correction: Grounding the Wire. When the vision comes, touch the earth. Literally. Place hands on a physical object. Remind the system: 'I am the wire, not the electricity.'

frequency.shadow_desc: The feeling of being lost in time and space; looking for direction outside oneself.
frequency.gift_desc: The innate magnetic lock on one's true north; effortless alignment with the flow of events.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The dissolution of the separate self into the perfect geometry of the whole.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Root Anchor. This is the biological capacity to be the earth itself. It is a deep, heavy, comforting gravity in the hips and legs that allows you to absorb and process the energy of the world without being moved by it.
A.shadow_manifestation: Depletion. You become a dumping ground for the environment. You absorb everyone else's stress, emotions, and fatigue until your own biological direction is lost. Physical exhaustion.
A.micro_correction: The Shield Protocol. Visualize a gold perimeter at arm's length. Breathe in your own energy; breathe out the 'foreign' static. Reclaim your gravity.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Space Holder. The gift of providing the container for another's genius. You do not initiate; you receive the spark (from RC01) and give it form, structure, and home. You are the womb of creation.
B.shadow_manifestation: Dependence. Feeling empty or purposeless without someone else to drive you. Giving away your power to anyone who speaks with certainty. The 'Doormat' frequency.
B.micro_correction: Sovereign Space. Practice saying 'Let me sit with that.' Never commit in the moment. Your power comes from waiting, not chasing.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Pattern Recognition. The mind that sees the blueprint behind the building. You do not invent the idea; you see how the idea fits into the larger map. You are the structural engineer of the universe.
C.shadow_manifestation: Over-Planning. Trying to map the territory before you have even entered it. Getting lost in the details of 'how' and missing the 'why.' Mental rigidity.
C.micro_correction: The Birds-Eye View. Zoom out. Ask: 'Does the structure serve the flow, or block it?' Loosen the grip on the plan.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Gnosis. A direct, non-verbal knowing of the geometric order of the cosmos. You just *know* where things belong. It is the internal compass that points to Truth without needing a map.
D.shadow_manifestation: Aimlessness. The dark night of the soul where the compass spins. Feeling utterly abandoned by the universe, drifting without purpose or coordinates.
D.micro_correction: Trust the Drift. When you feel lost, stop moving. Do not paddle. Let the current turn you. The orientation will return when you stop fighting the water.

frequency.shadow_desc: The terror of the unknown; the panic that arises when old structures dissolve.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to adapt and birth new order from the wreckage of the old.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The playful acceptance of the moment, untainted by the need to control the outcome.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Pulse of Change. A deep, throbbing pressure in the sacral area that signals a biological shift is occurring. It feels like 'something is dying, and something is being born,' but you don't know what yet.
A.shadow_manifestation: Panic. Misinterpreting the biological pressure of change as anxiety or illness. Trying to medicate or suppress the pulse instead of letting it mutate you.
A.micro_correction: Surrender to the Pulse. Lie down. Place hands on the lower belly. Say: 'I am being upgraded.' Do not label the sensation as 'bad.' It is just new.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Disruptor. You bring the new order to your relationships. You are the one who breaks the stagnant patterns in the family or the team. You introduce the 'x-factor' that changes the dynamic.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Saboteur. Subconsciously destroying relationships because you are bored or uncomfortable with stability. Creating chaos because peace feels stagnant.
B.micro_correction: Constructive disruption. Instead of blowing up the relationship, introduce a new *activity* or *context*. Mutate the container, not the bond.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The Quantum Leap. The mind that jumps over steps 2, 3, and 4 to get to 5. You do not learn linearly; you download understanding in packets. The 'Aha!' moment is your native state.
C.shadow_manifestation: Mental Fog. The 'gap' between downloads where nothing makes sense. You feel stupid or blocked because the next packet hasn't arrived yet. The void.
C.micro_correction: Honor the Void. When the mind goes blank, it is rebooting. Do not force it. Go for a walk. The download happens in the silence, not the struggle.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Evolutionist. The drive to push the entire species forward. You carry the genetic imperative to transcend the limitation of form. You are the biological agent of the future.
D.shadow_manifestation: Entropy Despair. Looking at the world and seeing only the chaos, not the potential order. Feeling crushed by the weight of a world that refuses to change.
D.micro_correction: The Long View. Remember that chaos is the mother of order. Your despair is just the friction of evolution. Breathe through the friction.

frequency.shadow_desc: The demand for answers *now*. The emotional rejection of anything that cannot be logically proved.
frequency.gift_desc: The gentle unraveling of complexity. The patience to find the logic within the chaos.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that all 'errors' were necessary deviations in the path of perfection.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Mental Engine. A biological pressure in the head to resolve doubt. It is a physical need to 'solve' the problem. The brain runs hot, burning calories on loops of 'Why?' and 'How?'.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Migraine of Doubt. Physical tension in the brow and neck from trying to force a logical answer that isn't ready. Obsessive looping that prevents sleep.
A.micro_correction: Cooling the CPU. Cold water on the face. Explicitly tell the brain: 'I am archiving this question for later.' Write it down to offload the RAM.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Skeptic. The role of testing the validity of others' statements. You are the 'quality control' in the relationship. You keep the tribe safe by asking the hard questions.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Cynic. Using logic as a weapon to dismantle others' dreams. Constantly pointing out the flaw without offering a solution. Intellectual arrogance.
B.micro_correction: Soft Logic. Preface your critique with: 'I see the vision; I just want to stress-test the structure.' Be a structural engineer, not a demolitionist.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The Strategist. The ability to look at a chaotic pattern and formulate a theory. You arrange the data points into a coherent narrative. You are the scientist of the soul.
C.shadow_manifestation: Theory Addiction. Falling in love with the answer, even if it's wrong. Ignoring data that disproves your pet theory. Rigidity.
C.micro_correction: The Devil's Advocate. Deliberately argue against your own conclusion. If your logic holds, it will survive the test. If not, let it break.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Absolver. The highest octave of logic is understanding *why* things happened the way they did. You bring peace by explaining the mechanics of the past. You forgive through understanding.
D.shadow_manifestation: Judgment. Holding onto the 'error' because you cannot understand the 'why.' condemning the chaos because it offends your sense of order.
D.micro_correction: Logic as Mercy. Use your mind to find the 'good reason' for the bad behavior. Find the logic in the madness, and the judgment will dissolve.

frequency.shadow_desc: The anxiety of being 'out of time'; pushing the river; the biological distress of rushing.
frequency.gift_desc: The cellular trust in natural timing; the ability to wait actively, like a predator or a saint.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The collapse of linear time; existing purely in the eternal Now where waiting is impossible.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Biological Clock. Your metabolism, breath, and heartbeat run on a fixed, non-negotiable rhythm. You are not designed to adapt to the world's speed; the world must adapt to yours. It feels like a deep, steady drumbeat in the lower spine.
A.shadow_manifestation: Arrhythmia. When you rush or let others hurry you, you physically sicken. Digestion stops, anxiety spikes, and you become clumsy/accident-prone. The 'hurry sickness.'
A.micro_correction: The Full Stop. When you feel the urge to rush, freeze. Literally stop moving for 10 seconds. Reset the internal BPM. Walk at half-speed.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Ritualist. You bond through shared patterns and routines. You stabilize others simply by being consistent. You are the 'rock' that others lean on because your timing never wavers.
B.shadow_manifestation: Rigidity. Forcing your routine on others as a control mechanism. Becoming a tyrant of time. Refusing to deviate from the script even when life demands it.
B.micro_correction: Soft Ritual. Invite others into your rhythm rather than forcing it. Say: 'I need to move at this pace; you are welcome to join me.'

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Pattern Lock. The ability to see the cyclical nature of history. You do not see a straight line; you see the spiral. You know that 'this too shall pass' and 'this too shall return.'
C.shadow_manifestation: Pessimism. Thinking 'nothing ever changes.' Being trapped in the loop of the past, unable to see that the spiral is moving upward.
C.micro_correction: Map the Spiral. Identify where you are in the cycle (Winter, Spring, Summer, Fall). Acknowledge that the season will change without your effort.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: Universal Flow. The alignment with the heartbeat of the Earth itself. You are a biological tuner that brings environments back into sync with nature.
D.shadow_manifestation: Disconnection. Living in artificial light, artificial time, and artificial air leads to deep existential dread. The 'Modern Malady.'
D.micro_correction: Solar Sync. Go outside. Look at the sky. Calibrate your eyes to natural light. Re-sync the circadian mechanism.

frequency.shadow_desc: The clash of separate egos; emotional volatility used as a defense mechanism.
frequency.gift_desc: The art of using friction to create warmth; navigating emotional barriers to create intimacy.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The dissolution of all boundaries; the state where defense is unnecessary because there is no 'other'.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The pH Regulator. You physically govern the acidity/alkalinity of your environment. You absorb the emotional toxicity of a room and filter it. It feels like 'heat' or 'nausea' in the gut when the vibe is off.
A.shadow_manifestation: Emotional Toxicity. When the filter clogs, you become acidic—irritable, snappy, and physically inflamed. You pick fights just to discharge the heat.
A.micro_correction: Water Reset. You are an emotional filter; you need to backwash the system. Drink a large glass of water. Wash your hands up to the elbows. Cool the skin.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Gatekeeper. You control access to intimacy. You are the membrane of the cell. Your 'No' is sacred because it protects the sanctity of the 'Yes.' You test others to see if they are worthy of entry.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Wall. Shutting everyone out out of fear of penetration. Testing people until they fail. Being cold to punish others for your own vulnerability.
B.micro_correction: The Conscious No. Do not ghost or ice people out. deliver the 'No' clearly and warmly. 'I am at capacity right now.' The clarity removes the friction.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Tactical Empathy. You understand the mechanics of human conflict. You see *why* people fight—the hidden needs, the fears, the strategies. You are the negotiator.
C.shadow_manifestation: Argumentative. Using your insight to win the fight rather than solve it. Poking the exact wound you know will hurt the most.
C.micro_correction: Drop the Weapon. You know where to hit them. Choose not to. Use the insight to de-escalate: 'I see you are scared of X, is that right?'

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Peace Treaty. The capacity to hold space for warring factions. You are the demilitarized zone. Your presence forces others to lay down arms.
D.shadow_manifestation: Appeasement. Creating fake peace by suppressing truth. The 'walking on eggshells' vibration. Peace at the cost of vitality.
D.micro_correction: Hold the Heat. Stand in the tension without trying to fix it. Let the fire burn until it transforms. Be the crucible.

frequency.shadow_desc: The misuse of power to separate and conquer; leading others into a hierarchy of fear.
frequency.gift_desc: The magnetic authority that aligns others toward a common future; leadership by presence, not force.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The pure embodiment of the Good; the leader disappears, leaving only the correct direction.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Iron Core. A physical sensation of uprightness and rigidity in the chest. You provide the 'backbone' for the group. When you collapse physically, the group collapses structurally.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Dictator. Using physical intimidation or loud dominance to compensate for a lack of true authority. Posturing. Chest puffing.
A.micro_correction: Spinal Alignment. Physical posture corrects energetic distortion. Shoulders back, sternum up. Align your own axis, and the room will align to you.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Chosen Leader. You cannot seize power; it must be projected onto you. You are the screen upon which the tribe projects its need for a father/mother figure.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Usurper. Trying to take the throne when no one has offered it. Resentment that 'no one listens to me.' Leading an army of one.
B.micro_correction: Wait for the Invitation. Do not give the order until they ask: 'What should we do?' Then, and only then, is your command absolute.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Strategic Logic. The General's mind. You see the battlefield from above. You understand logistics, supply lines, and morale. You know *how* to get from A to B.
C.shadow_manifestation: Bureaucracy. Obsession with the rules of the march rather than the destination. Orders for the sake of orders. Paralysis by protocol.
C.micro_correction: The Objective Check. Ask: 'Does this rule move us forward?' If not, burn the rule. Focus on the vector, not the vehicle.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Standard Bearer. You become the symbol of the movement. You do not need to speak; you simply stand there, and your presence reminds people of who they are.
D.shadow_manifestation: The Martyr. Dying for the cause because you forgot you *are* the cause. Sacrificing the self to maintain the symbol.
D.micro_correction: Embody the Code. Do not preach. Act. If you want the tribe to be calm, be calm. You are the tuning fork.

frequency.shadow_desc: The fear of standing out; diluting one's truth to blend into the gray noise of the collective.
frequency.gift_desc: The courageous expression of uniqueness; the rebellion against the generic.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that every form is a perfect, unique facet of the diamond of consciousness.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Acoustic Presence. Your voice is not just for communication; it is a frequency tool. The tone, timbre, and volume of your speech physically alter the cellular structure of the listener.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Mute / The Scream. Either losing your voice completely (laryngitis, choking up) or over-talking to prove you exist. The 'hollow' voice.
A.micro_correction: Humming. Activate the vocal cords without words. Hum deep in the chest to clear the throat chakra. Re-tune the instrument.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Promoter. You are the Public Relations agent for the divine. You see the talent in others and you know how to package it, sell it, and broadcast it to the world.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Hollow Man. Selling things you don't believe in. Using your gift of style to mask a lack of substance. The con artist.
B.micro_correction: Authenticity Check. 'Would I buy this?' If you do not believe in the product (or the person), your voice will crack. Only promote the real.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The Unique Concept. The mind that rejects the standard template. You are here to re-invent the wheel, not because the old wheel is broken, but because it is boring. You add the 'flare.'
C.shadow_manifestation: Weird for Weird's Sake. Being contrarian just to get attention. Creating complexity because simplicity feels like death.
C.micro_correction: Function First. Ensure the new design works *before* you add the style. Style without structure is just confetti.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Exemplar. You lead by being the absolute best version of yourself. You permit others to be weird by being unapologetically yourself.
D.shadow_manifestation: The Diva. Demanding special treatment because you are 'different.' The ego trap of uniqueness.
D.micro_correction: Walk the Talk. Don't tell them how to live. Live it so loudly that they can't ignore the signal. Be the evidence.

name: THE LENS
traditional_name: The Taming Power of the Small

frequency.shadow_desc: The paralysis of seeing too many details; getting stuck in the trivial loop.
frequency.gift_desc: The laser-like capacity to focus energy on a single, minute detail until it ignites.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that by mastering the smallest particle, one masters the universe.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Microscope. A physical inability to look away from the flaw or the detail. Your body goes rigid until the specific task is complete. It feels like a magnetic lock in the eyes and lower belly.
A.shadow_manifestation: Obsessive Loop. Picking at the skin, the scab, or the problem without fixing it. Expending massive biological energy on something that doesn't matter.
A.micro_correction: Zoom Out. Physically change your focal depth. Look at the horizon or a distant tree for 60 seconds. Break the visual lock.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Auditor. You bond by fixing things for others. You show love by noticing the one thing out of place and correcting it. You are the one who straightens the tie.
B.shadow_manifestation: Nitpicking. Destroying intimacy by focusing solely on the partner's flaws. 'You missed a spot.' The energy of the nagging critic.
B.micro_correction: Praise the Whole. Before you correct the 1% error, acknowledge the 99% perfection. 'The structure is beautiful; I just want to align this one brick.'

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Applied Logic. The mind that applies the formula to the real world. You do not deal in theory; you deal in data points. You are the scientist checking the variable.
C.shadow_manifestation: Analysis Paralysis. Drowning in the data points. Needing 'just one more study' before you can move. Using logic to delay action.
C.micro_correction: The 80% Rule. Decide that 80% certainty is enough to act. The last 20% of data will come from the movement itself.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Archimedian Point. The capacity to find the single leverage point that moves the world. You do not need to push hard; you just need to push *here*.
D.shadow_manifestation: Missed Leverage. Pushing against the wall instead of finding the door. Exhaustion from misapplied force.
D.micro_correction: Stop Pushing. Step back. Ask: 'Where is the hinge?' Apply force only to the fulcrum.

frequency.shadow_desc: The collapse of the world into the self; believing your pain or glory is the only reality.
frequency.gift_desc: The effortless ease of being oneself; the refusal to perform for others.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The dissolution of the 'I' into the pure experience of existence. I Am that I Am.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Sacred Walk. Your identity is rooted in your physical movement. The way you walk, sit, and breathe is your primary communication. You occupy space unapologetically.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Shrink. Physically collapsing the chest to take up less space. Apologizing for your body. The 'hunchback' frequency.
A.micro_correction: Claim the Space. Stand in the doorway. Spread your arms to touch the frame. Tell the body: 'I am allowed to exist here.'

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Mirror. You force others to see themselves by being relentlessly yourself. You trigger their insecurity or their liberation just by entering the room.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Diva/Martyr. Using the relationship as a stage for your drama. Demanding attention or pity to validate your existence.
B.micro_correction: Stop Performing. In the middle of the story, stop. Ask: 'Am I sharing this, or am I performing this?' Drop the mask.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Self-Knowledge. The mind that studies the Self. You are your own laboratory. You understand the world by understanding your own reaction to it.
C.shadow_manifestation: Solipsism. Believing your perspective is the *only* perspective. Inability to empathize because you cannot leave your own head.
C.micro_correction: The Other View. Deliberately ask: 'What does this look like from their eyes?' Force the camera angle to shift.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Icon. You become a symbol of self-love for the collective. Your very existence gives others permission to love themselves.
D.shadow_manifestation: Narcissism. The dark side of the icon. Believing you are superior because you are unique. Spiritual arrogance.
D.micro_correction: Service to Self is Service to All. Remind yourself: 'My self-love helps them, it does not elevate me above them.'

frequency.shadow_desc: The darkness of too many ideas; the mental fog of unrelated images seeking form.
frequency.gift_desc: The capacity to see the potential in everything; the magical realism of the soul.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The pure white radiance where all images dissolve back into the source.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Image Stream. Your brain is a cinema that never closes. You receive constant visual downloads. It feels like a pressure behind the eyes or a 'fullness' in the frontal lobe.
A.shadow_manifestation: Insomnia of Ideas. The inability to sleep because the movie won't stop. Physical exhaustion from processing too much light.
A.micro_correction: The Dump. Keep a notebook by the bed. When the stream starts, write/draw it out. You cannot sleep until the idea is 'caught.'

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Storyteller. You bond by sharing the vision. You are not here to fix the partner's reality; you are here to enchant it. You give them new eyes.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Fantasist. Falling in love with the *potential* of the person, not the reality. Disappointment when they fail to match your movie.
B.micro_correction: Reality Check. Look at the person, not the aura. Ask: 'Can I love what is here right now, without the potential?'

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Conceptual Synthesis. The ability to connect unrelated images into a new belief system. You are the weaver of memes and cultural narratives.
C.shadow_manifestation: Belief Rigidity. Confusing your idea with the Truth. Fighting wars over concepts that are just light refracting in a prism.
C.micro_correction: It's Just a Lens. Remind yourself: 'This idea is a tool, not a weapon.' Be willing to swap lenses.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Visionary. You carry the blueprint for the future of humanity. You see peace where others see war. You hold the lantern in the dark.
D.shadow_manifestation: Delusion. Getting lost in the utopia and ignoring the steps needed to get there. Spiritual bypassing.
D.micro_correction: Ground the Vision. Pick ONE element of the dream and take a physical action toward it today. Bring the light to earth.

frequency.shadow_desc: The misuse of the voice to hide the self; loving the sound of one's own cleverness.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to know *when* to speak and when to remain silent; the art of high-frequency communication.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The voice becomes the silence; the transmission of truth without the distortion of words.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Vocal Barometer. Your throat is the most sensitive instrument in your body. When you lie, it tightens. When you are with the wrong people, you lose your voice. It is a biological truth detector.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Cough/Choke. Chronic throat clearing, coughing, or tightness. This is the body rejecting the words you are trying to force out.
A.micro_correction: The Vow of Silence. If the throat is tight, stop speaking immediately. Do not push through. Wait for the channel to clear.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Romantic. You use language to court the other. You are here to articulate feelings that the other cannot express. You are the poet of the relationship.
B.shadow_manifestation: Malice. Using your gift of articulation to wound. Knowing exactly what to say to destroy the other's confidence. The 'poison pen.'
B.micro_correction: The Pause. Before you deliver the sharp line, breathe. Ask: 'Is this designed to heal or to cut?' Retract the blade.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The Translator. The mind that can translate emotion into logic, and spirit into science. You find the words for the ineffable.
C.shadow_manifestation: Elitism. Believing that because you are articulate, you are superior. dismissing those who cannot speak as well as you.
C.micro_correction: Listen to the Vibe. Ignore the grammar; listen to the frequency. Respect the signal, even if the transmission is static.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Prophet. The voice that speaks for the collective. When you speak from the clear channel, it is not you speaking; it is the Signal itself.
D.shadow_manifestation: The False Prophet. Speaking for the ego while claiming it is God. The manipulation of the masses through eloquence.
D.micro_correction: Empty the Vessel. Before a major speech or conversation, visualize yourself as a hollow flute. 'Let the breath play me.'

frequency.shadow_desc: The inability to filter the emotional noise of the past; hearing only the pain and trauma.
frequency.gift_desc: The capacity to listen not to the words, but to the frequency behind them; hearing the secret history.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The dissolution of the barrier between self and other; hearing the One Voice singing through seven billion mouths.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Acoustic Sponge. Your body physically absorbs the history of your environment. You do not just 'hear' with your ears; you 'hear' with your ribcage. Crowds feel like a roar of static.
A.shadow_manifestation: Sonic Overload. Physical nausea or exhaustion from being in loud emotional environments. The desire to go deaf to the world.
A.micro_correction: The Silence Protocol. You require absolute silence to discharge the absorbed data. Noise-canceling headphones are not a luxury; they are medical equipment.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Confessor. People instinctively tell you their secrets. You are the repository of the tribe's hidden history. You bond by holding the weight of another's truth.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Gossip/The Vault. Either leaking secrets to relieve the pressure (Gossip) or crushing yourself under the weight of unshared trauma (The Vault).
B.micro_correction: Discharge the Secret. You must release the energy without betraying the trust. Write the secret on paper, then burn it. Let the fire hold it.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Historical Patterning. The mind that learns from the past. You look backward to understand forward. You see the cycles of history repeating before anyone else does.
C.shadow_manifestation: Pessimism. Thinking 'we are doomed to repeat this.' Getting stuck in the rear-view mirror.
C.micro_correction: Find the Variance. Look at the cycle again. Find the *one thing* that is different this time. Focus on the evolution, not the repetition.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Universal Ear. The capacity to hear the collective cry of humanity. You are here to witness the species, not just the individual.
D.shadow_manifestation: Despair. Feeling the weight of the world's suffering without the power to fix it. The 'Atlas Complex.'
D.micro_correction: Witness, Don't Carry. Your job is to hear it, not to hold it. Say: 'I hear you,' and let the sound pass through you like wind through a tunnel.

frequency.shadow_desc: Using your immense energy to build someone else's dream for safety; selling the soul for security.
frequency.gift_desc: The efficient application of power to creative work; the ability to fuel a vision until it becomes reality.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that you *are* the source of wealth; the infinite generator that feeds the world.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The V8 Engine. You possess a massive biological fuel tank. You are designed to work long, hard hours, but only on things that light you up. The work itself must generate more energy than it consumes.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Mule. Grinding through work you hate. This turns your gold energy into lead, leading to severe lower back pain and gut rot.
A.micro_correction: The Spark Check. Before starting a task, ask: 'Does this ignite my gut?' If no, delegate it. If you cannot delegate, reframe it until it sparks.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Patron. You show love by providing resources. You back the people you believe in with time, money, or energy. You are the venture capitalist of the soul.
B.shadow_manifestation: Buying Love. Using resources to control others. 'I paid for this, so you owe me.' Transactional intimacy.
B.micro_correction: No Strings attached. If you give, give it freely. If you expect a return, call it a contract, not a gift.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Asset Management. The mind that instinctively understands value. You know what things are worth—not just price, but energy cost. You maximize ROI (Return on Investment) in all things.
C.shadow_manifestation: Greed. Hoarding resources because you fear the engine will stop. Valuing the bank account more than the life experience.
C.micro_correction: Circulate the Chi. Money is energy. If it stops moving, it rots. Spend on something that upgrades your capacity to create.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Engine of Creation. You are not working for yourself; you are powering the evolution of the whole. Your wealth is the world's wealth.
D.shadow_manifestation: Slave Driver. Forcing others to work at your pace. Burning out the team because they do not have your fuel tank.
D.micro_correction: Pacing the Pack. Recognize that you are the outlier. Slow down so the convoy can keep up.

frequency.shadow_desc: The fear of one's own extremes; hiding the wildness to appear 'normal' and safe.
frequency.gift_desc: The acceptance of all of life's rhythms; the capacity to attract others by being visibly alive and diverse.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The eternal spring where every being is allowed to bloom in its own time and way.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: Biological Diversity. Your body refuses to be consistent. Some days you need 10 hours of sleep, some days 4. Some days vegan, some days carnivore. You are the seasons in one body.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Gray Zone. Trying to force a 9-to-5 routine on a chaotic biology. This creates a deep, gray depression—a 'flatline' of the soul.
A.micro_correction: Embrace the Extremes. If you are tired, sleep for 12 hours. If you are wired, run until dawn. Stop trying to be the average.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Lover of Humanity. You do not love individuals; you love the species. You accept the weird, the broken, and the beautiful equally. You are the ultimate host.
B.shadow_manifestation: Shallowness. Knowing everyone but knowing no one. Being so open that you have no boundaries. The 'party animal' masking loneliness.
B.micro_correction: Deepen the Well. Pick one person to go deep with, amidst the crowd. Anchor the magnetism in intimacy.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Pattern Disruption. The mind that sees where the flow is blocked. You are the beaver that breaks the dam. You instinctively know how to get things moving again.
C.shadow_manifestation: Chaos Agent. Breaking things just to see them break. Disrupting peace because you are bored.
C.micro_correction: Strategic Flow. Only break the dam if the water needs to move. Intentional disruption, not accidental destruction.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Vortex. You are a spinning center of gravity. People are pulled into your orbit not because of what you do, but because of the life force you emanate.
D.shadow_manifestation: The Black Hole. Using your magnetism to feed on others' attention. Pulling them in and never letting them go.
D.micro_correction: Spin Out. Use your gravity to sling-shot people toward *their* destiny, not to trap them in yours.

frequency.shadow_desc: The diffusion of energy into a thousand shallow hobbies; the refusal to commit to the depth of mastery.
frequency.gift_desc: The joy of experimentation; the ability to pick up any tool and quickly find the rhythm.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The moment the tool disappears and the creator becomes the act of creation itself.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Technician. Your body learns by repetition. You need to physically *do* the thing to understand it. Muscle memory is your primary intelligence.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Dabbler. Trying a technique once, failing, and quitting. The accumulation of expensive equipment for hobbies you never pursue.
A.micro_correction: The 100 Rep Rule. Commit to doing the new skill 100 times before you judge your ability. Push through the 'suck' phase.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Critic. You bond by critiquing the performance. You want the best for others, so you point out where their technique is flawed.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Snob. Judging others for their lack of skill. Using your taste as a weapon to make others feel small.
B.micro_correction: The Sandwich. Validation - Critique - Encouragement. 'Your passion is great; if you adjust your grip, it will be better; keep going.'

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The Experimenter. The mind that asks 'What if I combine X with Y?' You are the alchemist of skills. You fuse cooking with coding, or music with math.
C.shadow_manifestation: Delusion. Thinking you are a master when you are just an enthusiastic amateur. Lack of foundational knowledge.
C.micro_correction: Verify the Foundation. Innovation requires knowing the rules before you break them. Learn the scales before you play jazz.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Performer. You channel the divine through the perfection of your craft. When you are 'in the zone,' you disappear, and only the art remains.
D.shadow_manifestation: The Empty Suit. All style, no substance. Performing the role of the master without the soul of the master.
D.micro_correction: Play for the Empty Room. Practice your art when no one is watching. If you still love it, it is real. If not, it is just for applause.

frequency.shadow_desc: The rigid attachment to a single perspective; confusing the map for the territory.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to see the architectural structure of the future; logic that serves the whole.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The single eye of God that sees all perspectives simultaneously as one holographic truth.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: Visual Framing. Your biology seeks patterns. When you look at a chaotic room or data set, your eyes physically twitch until they find the 'grid.' It is a biological hunger for order.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Glare. Physical eye strain or headaches from trying to 'force' a pattern where there isn't one. Tunnel vision.
A.micro_correction: Soften the Gaze. Switch from foveal (focused) vision to peripheral (panoramic) vision. Let the pattern reveal itself; do not hunt it.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The debater. You bond through intellectual combat. You respect those who can challenge your logic. You are not fighting to win; you are fighting to test the structure.
B.shadow_manifestation: Dogmatism. Refusing to listen because you have already decided you are right. Using logic to belittle the other's feelings.
B.micro_correction: Opinion Diet. Practice saying: 'I have a perspective on this,' instead of 'This is the truth.' Loosen the grip.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Systemic Logic. The mind that builds the framework. You do not just solve the problem; you build the system that solves the problem automatically.
C.shadow_manifestation: Theory over Reality. Falling in love with the perfect system that doesn't work in the real world. Ignoring the human variable.
C.micro_correction: The Reality Test. Ask: 'Does this beautiful theory survive contact with a messy Tuesday morning?' If not, simplify.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Watchtower. You see the long-term consequences that others miss. You are the lookout on the ship. You owe the collective your vision, not your labor.
D.shadow_manifestation: Cassandra Complex. Seeing the disaster coming but being ignored because you are too arrogant in your delivery.
D.micro_correction: Deliver with Grace. A warning delivered without love is just noise. Package the vision so it can be received.

name: THE EDITOR
traditional_name: Work on What Has Been Spoilt

frequency.shadow_desc: The relentless criticism of self and others; the fear of imperfection manifest as blame.
frequency.gift_desc: The high standard that demands wholeness; the courage to fix what is broken for the good of all.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that even the flaw is perfect; the cosmic acceptance of the 'glitch' as essential.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Taste Test. Your instinct is rooted in the lymphatic system. You can physically 'taste' when something is off, corrupt, or decaying. It manifests as a sourness in the mouth or a curl of the lip.
A.shadow_manifestation: Hypochondria. Obsessing over every tiny bodily sensation. Interpreting normal biological noise as a sign of decay or death.
A.micro_correction: Gut Check. Is this a true survival warning, or just your perfectionism attacking your own biology? Breathe into the spleen (left side).

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Improver. You love people by trying to fix them. You see their potential and you want to edit out their flaws. It comes from love, but feels like attack.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Nag. Constant correction. 'Stand up straight.' 'Don't eat that.' Destroying the spirit of the other in the name of improving them.
B.micro_correction: Permission to Edit. Never correct someone without a permit. Ask: 'Are you open to feedback right now?' If no, hold your tongue.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Critical Analysis. The mind that spots the error in the code, the flaw in the logic, or the gap in the plan. You are the ultimate debugger.
C.shadow_manifestation: Complaint Mode. Seeing *only* the flaw. Walking through a garden and only seeing the weeds. Mental negativity bias.
C.micro_correction: The Ratio. For every one flaw you identify, force yourself to identify three things that are working. Rebalance the data set.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Healer of the Lineage. You are here to correct the mistakes of your parents and ancestors. You break the curse.
D.shadow_manifestation: Victimhood. Blaming your parents for your programming. 'I am this way because they were that way.'
D.micro_correction: The Buck Stops Here. Acknowledge the damage, then claim the repair. 'They broke it; I fix it.' Take the power back.

frequency.shadow_desc: The desperate need for outside attention to feel safe; sacrificing the self to keep the tribe close.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to feel the needs of others before they speak; the master of emotional synthesis.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The willingness to give up one's separate form for the greater life of the whole.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Environmental Scanner. Your skin is a radar dish. You are physically sensitive to temperature, texture, and 'vibes.' You need a safe, comfortable nest to function.
A.shadow_manifestation: Allergic Reaction. Developing allergies or skin conditions as a rejection of a toxic environment. The body screaming 'Get me out of here.'
A.micro_correction: Control the Environment. Do not toughen up. Soften the nest. Adjust the lights, the fabric, the temperature. Honor the sensitivity.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Bargainer. You maintain intimacy through exchange. 'If I do this for you, will you protect me?' You bond through mutual need.
B.shadow_manifestation: Clinginess. The terror of being alone. Manipulating others into needing you so they cannot leave.
B.micro_correction: Own Your Needs. Stop bargaining. Just ask. 'I need a hug.' Direct communication kills the manipulation game.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Mammalian Intelligence. The mind that tracks the emotional hierarchy of the room. Who is safe? Who is hungry? Who is the alpha? You read the room instantly.
C.shadow_manifestation: Over-Vigilance. Constantly scanning for danger or rejection. Exhausting the adrenals by tracking everyone's emotional state.
C.micro_correction: Drop the Scan. Close your eyes. Tell the mammal brain: 'I am safe. I do not need to track them right now.'

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Bridge to Spirit. The sensitivity that is so high it touches the invisible. You are the shaman who feels the spirits because you feel everything.
D.shadow_manifestation: Spiritual Needing. Looking for a Guru or Savior to parent you. Giving away authority to the invisible.
D.micro_correction: Be the Altar. Do not look up for God. Look in. You are the sensitive instrument that Spirit plays.

frequency.shadow_desc: Skimming the surface of life; being everywhere but here; the busy-ness that avoids the void.
frequency.gift_desc: The total confidence that arises from being fully in the Now; correct action without thought.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The cessation of time; the realization that there is only the Eternal Moment.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Now Body. Your body only functions in the present tense. It cannot digest 'later.' It cannot rest 'tomorrow.' It demands total inhabitation right now.
A.shadow_manifestation: Disassociation. Floating above the body. Bumping into furniture because you are mentally in the future. The 'Zombie' mode.
A.micro_correction: The Clap. Clap your hands loudly once. Feel the sting in the palms. This shocks the system back into the current second.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Beholder. You see the person in front of you without the filter of the past. You offer the gift of total attention.
B.shadow_manifestation: Absenteeism. Nodding while someone speaks but checking your mental phone. Being physically present but energetically gone.
B.micro_correction: Eye Contact Lock. Look at the left eye. Do not look away until the connection is felt. Be *with* them.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Existential Thought. The mind that doesn't calculate; it contemplates. You absorb the moment and synthesize it into meaning.
C.shadow_manifestation: Mental Chatter. The 'Monkey Mind' that narrates the moment instead of living it. 'I am walking' instead of just walking.
C.micro_correction: Drop the Narrator. When the voice starts describing life, say 'Cancel.' Return to the sensation, not the description.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The I AM. The awareness that you are consciousness witnessing itself. You are the awakening signal for others.
D.shadow_manifestation: Spiritual Ego. Using 'presence' as a status symbol. 'Look how present I am.'
D.micro_correction: Disappear. True presence has no 'I'. If you are proud of your presence, you lost it. Return to the breath.

frequency.shadow_desc: The desperate need to micromanage life because you do not trust the flow; leading through fear.
frequency.gift_desc: The natural command of resources and people; leading by serving the needs of the tribe.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The courage to surrender all control to the Divine, realizing that true power is allowing.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Hunter's Jaw. A physical reflex to 'bite through' obstacles. When frustrated, you clench your teeth or hands. It is the biological imperative to secure food and territory.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Clinch. Chronic TMJ (Jaw tension) or high blood pressure. The body bracing for a fight that isn't happening.
A.micro_correction: Drop the Jaw. Physically unhinge the jaw. Open the mouth wide. Signal the nervous system: 'The hunt is over. We are fed.'

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Provider. You bond by taking charge. You show love by organizing the other person's life, finances, and safety. You are the CEO of the relationship.
B.shadow_manifestation: Domination. Making all the decisions because you think the other is incompetent. Suffocating the partner's will.
B.micro_correction: Delegate the Power. Hand over the remote control (literally or metaphorically). Practice trusting the other's choice, even if it is 'inefficient.'

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Resource Logic. The mind that sees resources where others see nothing. You know exactly what is needed to survive the winter. You are the ultimate strategist of supply.
C.shadow_manifestation: Scarcity Mindset. Hoarding. Focusing entirely on what is lacking rather than what is available. The fear of running out.
C.micro_correction: The Abundance Audit. List 3 resources you have in excess right now (Time, Love, Skills). Focus on the surplus, not the deficit.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The King/Queen. You do not demand respect; you command it by your presence. You represent the dignity of the human spirit.
D.shadow_manifestation: Tyranny. Using your status to exploit those below you. Believing you are the law, rather than a servant of the law.
D.micro_correction: Serve the Lowest. Perform a menial task (cleaning, carrying) for someone under your command. Re-ground the authority in service.

frequency.shadow_desc: Behaving without dignity to get what you want; emotional manipulation and social disgrace.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to handle intense emotional energy with elegance; suffering transmuted into art.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The descent of the Divine into the human form; the final erasure of karma through pure forgiveness.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Emotional Body. Your biology is ruled by the water element. You retain fluids and emotions. You are a vessel that must empty itself regularly to stay clear.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Crash. Sudden, unexplained sadness or physical heaviness. The body 'weeping' without tears (lethargy, edema).
A.micro_correction: The Water Cure. Immersion. Get in a bath, a lake, or a shower. Let the external water draw out the internal stagnation.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Charmer. You know exactly what to say to open doors. You understand the social game. You bond through romance, style, and listening.
B.shadow_manifestation: Social Climbing. Using charm to exploit others. Being 'fake nice' to get ahead. Flattery as a weapon.
B.micro_correction: Radical Honesty. Drop the charm. Say the awkward truth. Real connection is gritty, not polished.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Aesthetic Intelligence. The mind that thinks in beauty. You solve problems by making them beautiful. You know that if the equation isn't elegant, it's wrong.
C.shadow_manifestation: Vanity. Obsessing over the surface appearance while ignoring the structural rot. Decorating the cage.
C.micro_correction: Function is Beauty. Look at the ugly thing that works perfectly (e.g., a root system). Find the beauty in the utility.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The State of Grace. The capacity to forgive the unforgivable. You are here to release the karma of the collective through your own suffering.
D.shadow_manifestation: Spiritual Masochism. Believing you *must* suffer to be holy. Staying in abuse to 'transmute' it.
D.micro_correction: Grace is Ease. Remind yourself: 'I do not need to earn this light.' Grace is a gift, not a wage.

frequency.shadow_desc: The fragmentation of the mind into endless, fearful details; using jargon to hide insecurity.
frequency.gift_desc: The genius of cutting through the noise to find the essential truth; saying much with few words.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The alchemical extraction of the gold from the lead; touching the pure essence of consciousness.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Pressure Cooker. A buildup of acoustic pressure in the throat. You physically *need* to speak, but the words jam in the bottleneck. It feels like a stutter in the soul.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Explosion. Holding it in until you scream. Or, speaking so fast and garbled that no one understands, leading to physical frustration.
A.micro_correction: The Vowel Release. Do not try to use words. Just make a sound. 'Ahhh.' Let the pressure out through tone, not syntax.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Translator. You are the one who explains people to each other. 'He didn't mean that; he meant this.' You bridge the gap of understanding.
B.shadow_manifestation: talking Down. Treating others like they are stupid because they don't 'get it' as fast as you. Intellectual arrogance.
B.micro_correction: Check for Reception. 'Did that land?' Stop assuming they understood. Ask for feedback.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The Razor. The mind that dissects. You can look at a complex dogma and slice it open to reveal the one kernel of truth. You are the enemy of bullshit.
C.shadow_manifestation: Hair-Splitting. Using your razor to dissect things that should remain whole (like a joke or a romance). Analyzing the magic until it dies.
C.micro_correction: Put the Knife Down. Some things are for feeling, not dissecting. Allow the mystery to exist.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Oracle. When you speak from the Silence, you change the world. Your words are not opinions; they are structural mutations of reality.
D.shadow_manifestation: Speaking for Effect. Trying to sound profound. The 'Guru Voice.'
D.micro_correction: Silence First. Do not speak until the silence is unbearable. The longer you wait, the more potency the word has.

frequency.shadow_desc: The loop of the mind trying to fill the void; repetitive patterns of thought and substance.
frequency.gift_desc: The realization that the gap in the pattern is not a hole, but a womb for the new.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The cessation of the oscillating mind; the return to the absolute zero point of awareness.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Reset Button. Your biology works in pulses. You need periods of total shutdown (The Void) to reboot. You are not consistent; you are cyclical.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Loop. Getting stuck in a physical habit (eating, scrolling, smoking) because you are afraid of the shutdown. Numbing the gap.
A.micro_correction: The Conscious Pause. When you find yourself looping, stop. Close eyes. Count to 24. Accept the gap. Do not fill it.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Re-visitor. You bond by going back. You return to the same conversations, the same places, the same people, finding something new each time.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Ghost. Haunting your exes. Refusing to let the dead stay dead. Replaying the argument in your head for years.
B.micro_correction: Close the Door. To return to the new, you must leave the old. Perform a ritual of closure. 'It is finished.'

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Lateral Thinking. The mind that solves the problem by leaving the problem. You go for a walk, and the answer appears. You think in spirals, not lines.
C.shadow_manifestation: Obsessive Rationalization. Trying to force a logical answer to an irrational problem. The hamster wheel.
C.micro_correction: Walk Away. Literally. If the answer doesn't come in 5 minutes, leave the desk. The answer is in the gap, not the grind.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Zero Point. You carry the frequency of the Void. Your presence reminds others that underneath the noise, there is silence.
D.shadow_manifestation: Nihilism. 'Nothing matters.' Mistaking the Void for emptiness. Depression.
D.micro_correction: The Pregnant Void. Reframe emptiness as potential. 'It is not empty; it is full of what hasn't happened yet.'

frequency.shadow_desc: The narrowing of the spirit due to the wound of existence; breathless anxiety and spiritual panic.
frequency.gift_desc: The radical embrace of the present moment, including the pain; the return to the 'Beginner's Mind.'
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that you are not the one loving, but the Love itself observing the form.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Blood Memory. Your body holds the trauma and the glory of your entire genetic line. You do not just remember the past; you bleed it. Sudden, unexplained physical pains are often ancestral glitches releasing.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Sacred Wound. Hypersensitivity to pain. Believing that because you hurt, you are broken. Spiritual hypochondria.
A.micro_correction: Bleed it Out. Not literally. Use cold water shock (ice bath/face plunge) to reset the vascular system. Tell the blood: 'This is memory, not damage.'

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Innocent. You disarm others by refusing to fight. You bond through vulnerability. You trigger the 'protector' instinct in others.
B.shadow_manifestation: Naivety. Refusing to see the darkness in others. Getting hurt because you projected your own innocence onto a predator.
B.micro_correction: Eyes Open. You can be innocent without being blind. Accept that the wolf exists. Do not pet the wolf.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Non-Linear Wisdom. The mind that knows without learning. You skip the logic and land on the truth. It drives logicians crazy.
C.shadow_manifestation: Ignorance. Refusing to learn the facts because 'I just feel it.' Using intuition as an excuse for laziness.
C.micro_correction: Show Your Work. You know the answer (C), but try to map the steps (A -> B). Help the others follow your leap.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Universal Priest. You do not need a temple. Your body is the temple. You sanctify spaces simply by entering them.
D.shadow_manifestation: The Zealot. Demanding that everyone worship at your altar. Spiritual rigidity.
D.micro_correction: Every Step a Prayer. Walk across the room with the intent to bless the floor. Make the mundane sacred.

name: THE EGOIST
traditional_name: The Taming Power of the Great

frequency.shadow_desc: The inflation of the ego to mask a deep fear of worthlessness; the need to force the world to value you.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to manipulate energy and resources to create win-win scenarios; the master of the deal.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The ego becomes so transparent that it can act without leaving a trace; the hidden hand of God.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Immune Fortress. Your T-Cells are soldiers. You have a robust, 'cocky' biology that can fight off almost anything—until it crashes. You run on willpower.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Burnout. Pushing the body past its limits to prove you are strong. The 'weekend warrior' who collapses on Monday.
A.micro_correction: Rest as a Weapon. You see rest as weakness. Reframe it. 'Sleep is how I sharpen the blade.' Sleep to win.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Dealmaker. You view relationships as transactions of value. 'I give X, I get Y.' This is not cold; it is clear. You hate ambiguity.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Con Artist. Selling a version of yourself that doesn't exist. Making promises your soul cannot keep just to close the deal.
B.micro_correction: Under-Promise, Over-Deliver. Never sell the future. Sell only what you have in your hand right now.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Strategic Marketing. The mind that knows exactly how to package the truth so it will be bought. You are the spin doctor.
C.shadow_manifestation: Lying to Self. You spin the story so well you start to believe your own propaganda. Delusion.
C.micro_correction: The Mirror Test. Look in the mirror. Tell the unvarnished, ugly truth. Break the spin.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Trickster God. You teach through subversion. You use the ego to destroy the ego. You are the Coyote archetype.
D.shadow_manifestation: Malicious Manipulation. Using your power to trap others for your amusement or gain.
D.micro_correction: The Joke is on You. Can you laugh when you lose? If not, you are not a trickster; you are just a narcissist.

frequency.shadow_desc: The fear that there is not enough for you, leading to hoarding or draining others.
frequency.gift_desc: The natural impulse to use one's surplus to feed the tribe; care that empowers rather than cripples.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that there is no 'other' to feed; the universal circulation of light.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Feeder. Your biology is obsessed with fuel. You soothe yourself with food. Your gut is your second brain. When you are empty, you are dangerous.
A.shadow_manifestation: Emotional Eating. Using food to stuff down the anxiety of the Shadow. The 'Hangry' demon.
A.micro_correction: Fuel, Don't Fill. Ask: 'Am I hungry for protein, or am I hungry for comfort?' If comfort, use a blanket, not a burger.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Mother Frequency. Regardless of gender, you bond by mothering. You protect, you feed, you nurse. You carry the shield.
B.shadow_manifestation: Smothering. Caretaking to create dependency. 'You need me to survive.' Clipping the bird's wings so it stays in the nest.
B.micro_correction: Empower, Don't Enable. Teach them to fish. If you keep fishing for them, you are starving their soul.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Accounting. The mind that tracks the resources. 'We have 3 units of grain; we need 5.' You are the logistical guardian.
C.shadow_manifestation: Miserliness. Counting every penny/calorie so strictly that life loses its flavor. Fear of the empty ledger.
C.micro_correction: The Generosity Margin. Budget 10% of your resources to be 'wasted' on joy. Relax the grip.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Saint. The capacity to care for the untouchables. You see the divine in the broken. You feed the lepers.
D.shadow_manifestation: Martyrdom. Destroying your own health to prove how 'good' you are. Dying to feed the ghosts.
D.micro_correction: Put Your Mask on First. You cannot feed the world if you are dead. Self-care is a strategic imperative, not a luxury.

frequency.shadow_desc: The deep existential dread that life has no meaning; the collapse of the will to fight.
frequency.gift_desc: The courage to play the game of life fully, without attachment to the outcome; the embrace of risk.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that the soul is a player outside the game, untouched by the death of the avatar.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Adrenal Junkie. Your body wakes up only when there is risk. You feel dead in safety. You need the spike of cortisol and dopamine to feel alive.
A.shadow_manifestation: Recklessness. Gambling with your health or safety just to feel the rush. Driving too fast. Ignoring the brakes.
A.micro_correction: Controlled Risk. Take a cold shower. Sprint up a hill. Give the adrenals a job that doesn't involve dying.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Dark Knight. You bond through struggle. You trust the person who has bled with you in the trenches. Fair-weather friends mean nothing to you.
B.shadow_manifestation: Creating Drama. Starting a fight just to test if the partner will stay. 'If you can't handle me at my worst...'
B.micro_correction: Peace is not Death. Learn to bond in the quiet moments. Hold hands without squeezing.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Game Theory. The mind that calculates the odds. You see life as a chess board. You are always three moves ahead.
C.shadow_manifestation: Paranoia. Seeing enemies where there are none. Over-calculating the risk until you are paralyzed.
C.micro_correction: Play the Move. Stop calculating. Move the pawn. Trust your ability to adapt to the counter-move.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Hero's Journey. You realize that the obstacle is the way. You are here to slay the dragon, not for the gold, but for the becoming.
D.shadow_manifestation: The Anti-Hero. Refusing the call. Sitting in the tavern complaining about the dragon. Cynicism.
D.micro_correction: Accept the Quest. The difficulty is not a mistake; it is the level design. Press Start.

frequency.shadow_desc: The inability to fully commit to the cycle; saying 'yes' but holding back the energy; chronic flakiness.
frequency.gift_desc: The power to enter a cycle and stay until it is finished, regardless of the difficulty; total immersion.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that every cycle is a prayer; the dissolution of the 'I' into the act of service.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Deep Dive. Your body is designed for immersion. You cannot dabble. If you try to do something 'a little bit,' you get exhausted. You must be all in or all out.
A.shadow_manifestation: Chronic Fatigue. This is the result of saying 'yes' to things your sacral has rejected. Dragging the body through a cycle it hates.
A.micro_correction: The Binary Check. Ask: 'Am I willing to die for this?' If the answer is 'Kind of,' the answer is No. Quit immediately.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Ally. You bond by going through hell together. You do not trust people you meet at parties; you trust people you meet in crises.
B.shadow_manifestation: Over-Commitment. Saying 'yes' to everyone's crisis to feel needed. Becoming the reliable doormat.
B.micro_correction: The Pause Button. Never say 'Yes' in the moment. Say: 'Let me sleep on it.' Let the sacral decide, not the guilt.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Cyclic Logic. The mind that understands that success is not a straight line. You see the dip before the rise. You do not panic when things go wrong; you know it is part of the arc.
C.shadow_manifestation: Quitting at the Bottom. The tendency to abandon the project exactly when it gets hard, missing the upswing.
C.micro_correction: Map the Arc. Draw the cycle. Mark where you are (The Dip). Remind the brain: 'The only way out is through.'

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Tantric. You use the physical experience to touch the divine. Work, sex, and pain are all portals if you commit fully enough.
D.shadow_manifestation: Addiction to Intensity. Mistaking chaos for depth. Needing constant drama to feel like you are 'living.'
D.micro_correction: Sacred Mundane. Can you commit to washing the dishes with the same intensity as a lover? Find the depth in the boring.

frequency.shadow_desc: The hunger for what is not here; the burning need to fill the void with experience, leading to disappointment.
frequency.gift_desc: The acceptance of desire without the attachment to the outcome; the ability to burn brightly without consuming the self.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The burning up of the separate self in the fire of existence; the state of pure, causeless bliss.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Inner Fire. A literal sensation of heat in the stomach/solar plexus. It is the fuel of evolution. When repressed, it manifests as acid reflux or inflammation.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Burn. Intense craving (sugar, sex, drama) trying to satisfy a spiritual hunger. Consuming life but never feeling full.
A.micro_correction: Feed the Fire. Do not eat the cake; do the thing that scares you. The fire wants evolution, not calories.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Catalyst. You burn through relationships. You enter them intensely, change the other person, and often leave when the fire dies. You are the Phoenix.
B.shadow_manifestation: Clinging. Refusing to let the relationship die when the fire is out. Holding onto the ash.
B.micro_correction: Let it Burn. If the dynamic is dead, build a pyre. Honorable closure allows the next Phoenix to rise.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Emotional Intelligence. The mind that understands the logic of feeling. You know that 'feelings are not facts, but they are data.'
C.shadow_manifestation: Melodrama. Taking every emotion as a command from God. Getting lost in the opera of your own life.
C.micro_correction: Watch the Movie. View your emotions as a film projected on a screen. Enjoy the tragedy, but remember you are the audience.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Fate Weaver. You realize that desire is the mechanism of fate. What you burn for is what pulls you through the timeline.
D.shadow_manifestation: Victim of Fate. 'Why does this always happen to me?' Blaming the universe for the fires you lit.
D.micro_correction: Own the Fire. Say: 'I desired this lesson.' When you own the desire, you own the destiny.

frequency.shadow_desc: The belief that you know what is best for others; leadership disconnected from the heart.
frequency.gift_desc: The art of articulating the collective vision; leading by representing the voice of the people.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that the leader is the servant of the led; the total dissolution of the 'I' into the 'We'.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Voice of Command. A physical resonance in the larynx that commands attention. When you speak, heads turn. It is biological authority.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Barker. Using volume to compensate for a lack of true authority. Shouting to be heard. Throat soreness from forcing the will.
A.micro_correction: Whisper. True authority does not need to shout. Lower your volume. Force them to lean in.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Elected. You cannot force leadership; it must be voted on by the tribe. You bond by representing the needs of the other.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Politician. Saying what they want to hear to get power. Manipulation of the electorate.
B.micro_correction: The Vow. 'I serve you, I do not rule you.' Remind the partner that you are their representative, not their boss.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Strategic Vision. The mind that sees the path forward for the group. 'If we go this way, we survive.'
C.shadow_manifestation: Rigidity. Refusing to change the plan when the territory changes. 'My way or the highway.'
C.micro_correction: The Pivot. A good leader changes the plan to save the vision. Be attached to the destination, flexible on the route.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Avatar. You become the embodiment of the collective hope. You are the face on the coin.
D.shadow_manifestation: Messiah Complex. Believing the projection. Thinking you *are* the hope, rather than just the carrier of it.
D.micro_correction: Take off the Crown. When you get home, take out the garbage. Remind the ego that you are human.

frequency.shadow_desc: The deep, biological fear of lack; the terror that the tribe will not survive the winter.
frequency.gift_desc: The instinctive knowledge of what to keep and what to discard to ensure survival; financial and tribal endurance.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The recognition of the sacred in all things; the preservation of life as an act of worship.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Scent of Danger. Your spleen (immune system) is a radar for risk. You physically 'smell' when a deal, a person, or a situation is rotten.
A.shadow_manifestation: Paralysis. The fear of failure is so high you never start. Hoarding energy/money because you are terrified of the crash.
A.micro_correction: Trust the Nose. If it smells bad, leave immediately. Do not rationalize. If it smells good, invest.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The CFO. You bond by securing the future. You are the one who checks the bank account and buys the insurance. You love by ensuring survival.
B.shadow_manifestation: Stinginess. Refusing to spend on joy. Viewing the partner as a financial risk rather than a soul.
B.micro_correction: Invest in Memory. Money is for living, not just surviving. Spend on an experience that builds the bond.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Long-Term Logic. The mind that thinks in decades, not days. You understand the compound interest of effort.
C.shadow_manifestation: Conservatism. Fear of the new. Rejecting innovation because it is 'unproven.' Stagnation.
C.micro_correction: The Pilot Program. Test the new thing with a small investment. mitigate the risk, but do not block the progress.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Ancestral Guard. You are the keeper of the lineage. You ensure the wisdom of the past is not lost in the rush of the future.
D.shadow_manifestation: Tradition Worship. 'We have always done it this way.' Keeping dead rituals alive out of fear.
D.micro_correction: Prune the Tree. Keep the roots, but cut the dead branches. Tradition must evolve to survive.

frequency.shadow_desc: The misuse of retreat to hide from life; getting lost in the past without extracting the wisdom.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to step back from the stream of events to see the pattern; the witness consciousness.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The sudden unveiling of the divine structure of reality; the memory of the Source.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Privacy Wall. Your body has a biological need to withdraw. When you are over-exposed to people, your throat tightens and your energy crashes. You need a cave to digest the day.
A.shadow_manifestation: Isolation. Withdrawing in anger or fear. Cutting off communication so completely that you forget how to return.
A.micro_correction: The Scheduled Cave. Do not wait until you crash. Schedule 30 minutes of absolute solitude daily. It is medicine, not escape.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Storyteller. You bond by sharing the history. You are the one who remembers the anniversary, the old stories, the lineage. You anchor the relationship in time.
B.shadow_manifestation: Stuck in the Good Old Days. Refusing to let the relationship evolve. Comparing the present partner to a memory of who they used to be.
B.micro_correction: Edit the Story. Retell the past, but focus on the growth, not the loss. Make the memory fuel for the future.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Reflective Intelligence. The mind that works best in review. You often don't know what you think until *after* the event is over. You are the Monday Morning Quarterback of the soul.
C.shadow_manifestation: Regret. The loop of 'I should have said X.' Replaying the tape to torture yourself rather than learn.
C.micro_correction: Extract the Lesson. Write down the ONE thing you learned. Once the lesson is extracted, the memory can be archived. Close the file.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Witness. You are here to observe the end of cycles. You stand at the deathbed of empires and eras, recording what happened so the next cycle can be better.
D.shadow_manifestation: Disconnection. Watching the world burn and feeling nothing. The cold observer.
D.micro_correction: Compassionate Witnessing. Watch with your heart open. Feel the grief of the ending without drowning in it.

frequency.shadow_desc: The clumsy application of power; bullying reality to fit your will; unawareness of your own strength.
frequency.gift_desc: The majestic, effortless display of power; doing difficult things with grace; the peaceful warrior.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The power that requires no action; the presence that commands the elements simply by being.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Generator Core. You are the strongest biological engine in the Codex. You have infinite energy, but only for *one thing at a time* (unless integrated). You are a battering ram.
A.shadow_manifestation: Bulldozing. Moving so fast you break things (and people) without noticing. Physical clumsiness due to excess torque.
A.micro_correction: Gentle Giant. Before you move, check your surroundings. Imagine you are moving through water. Slow the torque.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Protector. You use your power to shield the weak. You are the wall behind which the tribe hides. You show love by standing in front of the danger.
B.shadow_manifestation: Intimidation. Using your size/energy to silence opposition. 'My way because I am bigger.'
B.micro_correction: Kneel Down. When speaking to someone with less energy, sit down. Lower your physical status to equalize the field.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Single-Track Focus. The mind that cannot be distracted. When you are locked on, the rest of the world ceases to exist. Deep work capability.
C.shadow_manifestation: Tunnel Vision. Ignoring vital data because it is not on your track. Missing the cliff because you are watching the road.
C.micro_correction: Look Up. Every hour, break the lock. Scan the horizon. Re-engage the peripheral radar.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Pillar. You are the battery of the collective. Your mere existence powers the grid of your community. You do not need to 'do'; you just need to hum.
D.shadow_manifestation: Exploitation. Letting everyone plug into you until you are drained. The 'Atlas' syndrome.
D.micro_correction: Unplug the Parasites. You decide who gets to charge at your station. Audit the connections.

frequency.shadow_desc: The insatiable void that consumes experiences without digesting them; the boredom that destroys.
frequency.gift_desc: The joy of the journey for its own sake; the willingness to explore the unknown without a map.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that space and time are the playground of consciousness; being everywhere at once.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Adrenaline Itch. A physical vibration in the legs and chest that demands a change of scenery. You cannot sit still. If you are stagnant, you physically ache.
A.shadow_manifestation: Manic Flight. Running away from the present moment because it feels 'boring.' Changing jobs/partners just to get the dopamine hit of the new.
A.micro_correction: Micro-Adventure. You do not need to move to Bali. Take a new route to work. Eat a new food. Feed the itch cheaply.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Casanova/Siren. You bond through the thrill of the chase. You love the 'first date' energy. You are here to teach the other about passion.
B.shadow_manifestation: Disposable People. Using people as experiences. discarding them when the 'new car smell' fades.
B.micro_correction: Deepen the Adventure. Can you find a new adventure *within* the same person? Explore their depths, not just their surface.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Progressive Logic. The mind that asks 'What is next?' You are never satisfied with the status quo. You are the engine of technological and social update.
C.shadow_manifestation: Dissatisfaction. Unable to enjoy the victory because you are already looking at the next mountain. Chronic unhappiness.
C.micro_correction: Celebration Protocol. You are forbidden to start the next project until you have thrown a party for the last one. Anchor the progress.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Evolutionist. You carry the hunger of the species. You push humanity into space, into the ocean, into the new dimension.
D.shadow_manifestation: Destruction. Burning the earth to fuel the rocket. Progress at the cost of the foundation.
D.micro_correction: Sustainable Progress. Ensure the launchpad is intact before you blast off. respect the ground you leave behind.

frequency.shadow_desc: The addiction to emotional drama; the belief that life is a constant emergency.
frequency.gift_desc: The profound compassion born from surviving the darkness; the ability to hold space for others' pain.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The total embrace of suffering as a necessary mechanism for the opening of the heart.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Emotional Storm. Your body processes the pain of the world. You experience sudden waves of grief, anger, or fear that have no logical source. It is a biological purging mechanism.
A.shadow_manifestation: Panic Attack. Misinterpreting the energy wave as a medical emergency. Resistance to the feeling causes the system to short-circuit.
A.micro_correction: Ride the Wave. Do not fight it. Lie down. Breathe. Say: 'This is just weather.' It will pass in 20 minutes if you don't feed it.

B.title: RELATIONAL
