B.description: The Sexual Healer. You bond through intensity. You use intimacy to heal the darkness. You are not afraid of the partner's shadows.
B.shadow_manifestation: Trauma Bonding. Connecting only through shared pain. 'We are both broken, so we belong together.'
B.micro_correction: Bond in the Light. Make sure you can also laugh together. If you only cry together, it is a hospital, not a relationship.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Crisis Management. The mind that becomes crystal clear when the building is on fire. While others panic, you download the exit strategy.
C.shadow_manifestation: Manufacturing Crisis. Subconsciously sabotaging your life because you are bored by peace. You need the fire to feel smart.
C.micro_correction: Peace is not Boredom. Learn to use your intelligence for creation, not just rescue. Build something that doesn't burn.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Bodhisattva. You have been to hell and back, so you are not afraid of the dark. You can sit with the dying, the mad, and the lost.
D.shadow_manifestation: Suffering Porn. Wallowing in the darkness. Believing that pain makes you holy.
D.micro_correction: Light the Candle. Your job is not to stay in the dark; it is to bring the light *into* the dark. Be the dawn.

frequency.shadow_desc: The collapse of boundaries due to a desperate need for approval; over-sentimentality that ignores truth.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to hold the family together without dissolving into it; creating a community of equals.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The universal embrace that recognizes every being as a member of the divine family.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Touch. Your biology runs on tactile confirmation. You need hugs, handshakes, and physical proximity to feel safe. A lack of touch feels like starvation.
A.shadow_manifestation: Clinging. Physical neediness that suffocates others. Using touch to possess rather than to connect.
A.micro_correction: Self-Soothing. Do not demand the touch. Place your own hand on your heart. Warm your own chest. Signal safety to the mammal.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Glue. You are the emotional binding agent of the group. You mediate the conflicts, plan the dinners, and keep the peace. You are the 'House.'
B.shadow_manifestation: The Martyr Mother. 'After all I did for you.' Weaponizing your care to induce guilt in the tribe.
B.micro_correction: Contracts of Care. Be clear about the exchange. 'I will cook if you clean.' Equality kills the martyr.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Emotional Logic. The mind that bargains. 'If we do X, everyone will be happy.' You calculate the emotional cost of every decision.
C.shadow_manifestation: People Pleasing. Agreeing to bad logic just to keep the emotional temperature down. Avoiding the hard truth.
C.micro_correction: Truth over Peace. Sometimes the family needs a fight to be healthy. Do not smooth over the crack; fix the foundation.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Universal Family. You see the tribe extending beyond blood. You build communities that include the outcast.
D.shadow_manifestation: Cultism. Creating an 'Us vs. Them' dynamic. Excluding the world to protect the inner circle.
D.micro_correction: Open the Door. True family has no walls. Invite the stranger to the table.

frequency.shadow_desc: Fighting because you don't know how to stop; the addiction to resistance; making life harder than it needs to be.
frequency.gift_desc: The indomitable spirit that finds meaning in the obstacle; fighting only for what matters.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The recognition that the enemy is also the self; the fight becomes a dance of unity.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Shield. Your body is armored. You hold tension in the shoulders and lower back, always ready for an attack. You physically brace against the world.
A.shadow_manifestation: Chronic Tension. Exhaustion from fighting gravity. The inability to physically relax even when safe.
A.micro_correction: Drop the Shield. Lay flat on the floor. Tell the adrenals: 'No tigers here.' Force the muscles to unlock.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Sparring Partner. You bond through challenge. You trust people who push back. If they agree with everything, you do not respect them.
B.shadow_manifestation: Picking Fights. Creating conflict just to feel the connection. Provoking the partner to prove they care.
B.micro_correction: Shadow Boxing. If you need to fight, go hit a gym bag. Do not use your partner as a punching bag for your energy.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Opposition Research. The mind that looks for the flaw in the plan. 'This won't work because...' You are the stress-tester.
C.shadow_manifestation: Defensiveness. Arguing every point. Listening only to reload your weapon. Being 'Right' instead of being helpful.
C.micro_correction: The 3-Second Pause. When challenged, wait 3 seconds before answering. Let the adrenaline spike pass so the wisdom can speak.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Holy War. You fight for the light. You realize that the struggle is not against people, but against entropy itself.
D.shadow_manifestation: Crusader Syndrome. Destroying the world to save it. Justifying violence with righteousness.
D.micro_correction: Fight with Love. If you hate your enemy, you have already lost. Fight the darkness, love the dark-bearer.

frequency.shadow_desc: Poking the wound just to see the reaction; projecting internal pain onto others to create a release.
frequency.gift_desc: The energy that breaks stagnation; the pressure that cracks the seed so it can grow.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The final breaking of all chains; the realization that the obstacle was the path all along.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Pressure Valve. A buildup of hydraulic pressure in the root/adrenal system. You feel like a shaken soda bottle. You *must* explode or you will implode.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Binge. Eating, drinking, or screaming to release the pressure. Destructive release mechanisms.
A.micro_correction: Sonic Release. Scream into a pillow. Run until your lungs burn. The pressure is physical; the release must be physical.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Tease. You use provocation as foreplay. You test the spirit of the other. You want to see what lies beneath their mask.
B.shadow_manifestation: Emotional Sadism. Hurting feelings just to feel powerful. finding the trigger and pressing it repeatedly.
B.micro_correction: Test for Growth, not Pain. Provoke them to be better, not to be hurt. Poke the potential, not the wound.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The Obstacle Course. The mind that thrives on the problem. Easy things bore you. You need a puzzle that fights back.
C.shadow_manifestation: Self-Sabotage. Creating problems because the solution is too easy. Tripping yourself just to see if you can catch the fall.
C.micro_correction: Choose Worthy Puzzles. Do not break your own life. Go solve a world problem. Give the brain a mountain, not a molehill.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Breaker of Chains. You are here to liberate the human spirit from its traps. Your energy frees the stuck.
D.shadow_manifestation: Anarchy. Burning down the prison with the prisoners still inside. Reckless liberation.
D.micro_correction: Unlock, Don't Blow Up. Find the key. Pick the lock. Liberation requires skill, not just dynamite.

frequency.shadow_desc: The inability to say no; giving resources until the well is dry; the loneliness of the provider.
frequency.gift_desc: The will to provide for the tribe while setting sacred boundaries; the power to say 'It is enough.'
frequency.siddhi_desc: The surrender of the personal will to the Will of the Whole; absolute deliverance from the need to prove worth.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Laborer. Your body is built to work, but also to rest deeply. You carry the tension in the stomach (Will Center). When you overwork, the digestion stops.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Ulcer. Trying to digest more stress than the body can handle. Working through the break.
A.micro_correction: The Sacred No. Your 'No' is a physical act of healing. Decline a request today. Feel the stomach relax.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Breadwinner. You bond by providing. 'I work, therefore I love.' You seek a partner who appreciates the effort, not just the money.
B.shadow_manifestation: Isolation. Feeling used. 'They only love me for what I bring.' Withdrawing because no one feeds *you*.
B.micro_correction: Ask to be Fed. You must teach them how to nourish you. 'I need you to cook for me tonight.' Balance the scales.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Resource Management. The mind that calculates the energy cost. 'Is this goal worth the caloric expenditure?' You are the efficiency expert.
C.shadow_manifestation: Cheapness. Refusing to spend energy on joy. Viewing everything as a cost, never an investment.
C.micro_correction: Value the Intangible. Calculate the ROI of a smile, of rest, of peace. Add 'Joy' to the spreadsheet.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Deliverer. You free others from their burdens by taking them on your own shoulders. You are the Christ-figure in the micro-cosm.
D.shadow_manifestation: False Messiah. Thinking you can save everyone. Collapsing under the weight of the world's karma.
D.micro_correction: Drop the Cross. You are not here to save them; you are here to love them. Put the burden down.

frequency.shadow_desc: The loop of dreaming about the future to escape the present; the addiction to 'what if' without the will to manifest.
frequency.gift_desc: The energetic fueling of the future; using the imagination to blueprint the next evolutionary leap.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that the dreamer and the dream are one; reality flows effortlessly from the zero point.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Biological Spark. This is the 'Start Codon' of the human genome. It feels like a restless, hungry contraction in the lower body. It is the physical sensation of a new year beginning, even in the middle of summer.
A.shadow_manifestation: Restless Leg Syndrome. The energy wants to move into a new experience, but you trap it in the mind. Physical agitation.
A.micro_correction: Initiate Movement. Do not plan. Just take the first step. The body needs to feel the 'Start' button being pressed.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Dream Sharer. You bond by fantasizing together. You love the partner who can co-imagine a future with you. The relationship is fueled by 'what comes next.'
B.shadow_manifestation: Projection. Falling in love with the fantasy version of the person. Disappointment when the reality does not match the dream.
B.micro_correction: Ground the Dream. Ask: 'Do I love the person here now, or the person I imagine they will become?' Love the Now.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Visual Architecture. The mind that sees the movie before it is filmed. You run simulations of the future. You are the screenwriter of timeline probability.
C.shadow_manifestation: Escapism. Living in the simulation. Preferring the novel/game/movie to actual life because reality is 'too slow.'
C.micro_correction: One Brick Reality. Take one element from the simulation and build it in matter. Bridge the gap.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Primer. You hold the blueprint for the collective's next step. You sense the zeitgeist before it arrives.
D.shadow_manifestation: Prophetic Anxiety. Feeling the weight of the future crashing in. 'Something is coming and I am not ready.'
D.micro_correction: Empty the Cup. You cannot channel the new if you are full of the old. Fasting (information or food) clears the channel.

frequency.shadow_desc: The attachment to a specific outcome; the inability to let the cycle die naturally; grief disguised as control.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to fully engage in the process while letting go of the result; the master of endings.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The joy of the cycle itself; seeing birth and death as the same festive movement of energy.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Marathon Runner. Your biology is designed for the long haul. Once you start, you physically cannot stop until the loop is closed. Stopping early causes physical constipation/stagnation.
A.shadow_manifestation: Burnout Loop. Continuing to run even when the race is over. The inability to switch off the engine.
A.micro_correction: The Finish Line Ritual. You must physically mark the end. Cross a line. Ring a bell. Tell the body: 'Done.'

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Midwife of Death. You help relationships transition. You are the one who knows when it is time to say goodbye. You bring closure.
B.shadow_manifestation: Dragging the Corpse. Keeping a dead relationship alive because you are afraid of the ending. Avoidance of the final talk.
B.micro_correction: Honorable Exit. A clean break heals faster than a ragged tear. Give the ending the dignity of a beginning.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Cyclic Review. The mind that analyzes the growth. 'What did we gain from this?' You maximize the harvest of every experience.
C.shadow_manifestation: Greed for Growth. Never being satisfied. 'Next, next, next.' Missing the harvest because you are planting the new field.
C.micro_correction: The Harvest Pause. Stop. Look at what you built. Ingest the wisdom before moving on.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Universal Pulse. You align with the planetary cycles (seasons, moon, eras). You teach the world how to die and be reborn.
D.shadow_manifestation: Fatalism. 'Everything dies, so why bother?' Nihilism born of seeing too many endings.
D.micro_correction: Death feeds Life. Remember the compost. The end of the cycle is the fertilizer for the origin (41).

frequency.shadow_desc: The inability to hear others because the inner noise is too loud; paranoia that you are misunderstood.
frequency.gift_desc: The creative rebellion that hears a frequency no one else hears; the genius of the mutant mind.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The thunderbolt of pure knowing; the silence where the individual mind merges with the Universal Mind.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Acoustic Shield. Your inner ear physically tunes out external noise when you are processing. You appear 'deaf' or absent. This is a protective mechanism for the inner voice.
A.shadow_manifestation: Vestibular Chaos. Vertigo or dizziness when the world tries to force its noise in. The physical rejection of external input.
A.micro_correction: Protect the Silence. Do not apologize for not listening. 'I am processing right now.' Buy time for the insight.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Misunderstood. You bond with those who can tolerate your weirdness. You need a partner who doesn't demand you make sense instantly.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Outcast. Pushing people away because 'no one understands me.' Wearing your rejection as armor.
B.micro_correction: Explain the Gap. 'My mind works differently; please be patient while I translate.' Build the bridge.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Mutation Logic. You do not think in steps (1, 2, 3); you think in leaps (1, 10, 100). You arrive at the answer without knowing the math.
C.shadow_manifestation: Mental Anxiety. The fear that you are crazy because you cannot explain how you know what you know.
C.micro_correction: Trust the Leap. The logic will follow the insight. Do not wait for the proof to speak the truth.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Voice of the New. You are the channel for ideas that do not exist yet. You bring the future into the present through sound.
D.shadow_manifestation: Noise Pollution. Speaking just to hear yourself. Filling the silence with anxiety.
D.micro_correction: Wait for the Click. Do not speak until the insight 'clicks' into place. Insight is efficient; noise is messy.

frequency.shadow_desc: The fear of the past repeating itself; the chaotic relationships formed out of old trauma patterns.
frequency.gift_desc: The instinctive ability to recognize the right people for the right fractal; the master of personnel.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The self-organizing social order where every being is perfectly placed by the intelligence of the whole.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: Cellular Memory. Your immune system remembers every person you have ever met. Your body rejects people who carry the 'scent' of past trauma.
A.shadow_manifestation: Allergic to People. Getting sick or drained around certain people without a logical reason. The body saying 'No.'
A.micro_correction: Scent Check. Breathe in the room. Does it smell fresh or stale? If stale, leave. Your nose knows more than your brain.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Headhunter. You know exactly how people fit together. You are the matchmaker of the business and social world. You see the geometry of connection.
B.shadow_manifestation: Manipulation. Using your knowledge of people's patterns to exploit them. 'I know what you need, so I own you.'
B.micro_correction: Serve the Geometry. Connect people for *their* benefit, not your profit. Be the honest broker.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Pattern Matching. The mind that recognizes the recurring loop. 'This is just like 1999.' You sell the future by understanding the past.
C.shadow_manifestation: Prejudice. Judging a new person based on an old pattern. 'You are just like my ex.'
C.micro_correction: Clean Slate. Acknowledge the pattern, but look for the deviation. Allow the person to be new.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Fractal King/Queen. You are here to clear the karmic debris of your lineage. You rewrite the contract of interaction.
D.shadow_manifestation: Karmic Debt. Feeling you owe everyone. Getting stuck in relationships out of guilt.
D.micro_correction: Burn the Contract. You are free. You choose your team based on resonance, not history.

frequency.shadow_desc: The fear of losing territory; using hierarchy to suppress others; hoarding resources out of insecurity.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to gather disparate elements into a unified whole; leadership that multiplies value for everyone.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that we are all gathering around the same central fire; the distribution of grace.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Royal Posture. Your biology demands territory. You feel physical discomfort in cramped spaces or when you are 'managed' by others. You need a throne (a defined space) to breathe.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Tyrant's Cough. Throat issues or chest tightness when you feel your authority is being challenged or ignored.
A.micro_correction: Claim Your Square. Do not fight for the whole kingdom. Mark a small territory (even a desk) and rule it with absolute sovereignty.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Educator. You bond by teaching. You want to upgrade the tribe. You show love by sharing the 'best' way to do things.
B.shadow_manifestation: Condescension. Speaking down to the partner. 'Let me show you how to do it right.' Treating equals like subjects.
B.micro_correction: The Student Hat. Intentionally ask your partner to teach *you* something. Step down from the podium to level the gaze.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The CEO Mind. The ability to see the bottom line instantly. You filter all data through: 'Does this make a profit (energy/money)?' Efficiency logic.
C.shadow_manifestation: Ruthlessness. Cutting people out because they are not 'profitable.' reducing human complexity to a spreadsheet.
C.micro_correction: The Human Variable. Remind the CEO brain that morale is an asset. Kindness has an ROI, even if it is invisible.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Distributor. You are the central node for resource flow. You do not own the rain; you just decide where it falls.
D.shadow_manifestation: Hoarding. Stopping the flow. Thinking the resources belong to you, rather than flowing *through* you.
D.micro_correction: Open the Sluice. If you feel stuck, give something away. Money/energy must move to grow.

frequency.shadow_desc: The rejection of the physical body; living in the mind to avoid the messiness of flesh; rigidity.
frequency.gift_desc: The pure joy of being in a body; the realization that spirit is not 'up there' but 'in here.'
frequency.siddhi_desc: The continuous orgasm of existence; the cellular realization of the Divine in every atom.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Physical Vessel. Your spirituality is biological. If your back hurts, your spirit is broken. You cannot meditate your way out of a bad diet.
A.shadow_manifestation: Body Dysmorphia/Hate. Viewing the body as a cage or a donkey to be whipped. Ignoring pain until the collapse.
A.micro_correction: Worship the Flesh. Touch your own arm with reverence. Say: 'This is the temple.' Treat the body like a cathedral, not a garage.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Sensualist. You bond through shared physical experience. Words mean less than a shared meal, a hike, or a touch.
B.shadow_manifestation: Frigidity. Shutting down the senses to punish the partner. Refusing to be touched.
B.micro_correction: Sensory Bridge. Connect through a third object. 'Taste this.' 'Smell this.' Let the sensation carry the love.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Experiential Logic. You learn by doing. You cannot understand the theory until you have physically practiced the movement.
C.shadow_manifestation: Clumsiness. Trying to understand with the head what can only be understood by the hands. Thinking about dancing instead of dancing.
C.micro_correction: Drop the Book. Stop reading about it. Do it badly. The body learns what the mind misses.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: Serendipity. You are always in the right place at the right time—if you are in your body. Your body is the GPS for luck.
D.shadow_manifestation: Bad Timing. Being out of sync because you are in your head. Missing the bus, missing the moment.
D.micro_correction: Ground for Luck. If you feel 'unlucky,' stomp your feet. Luck lives in the ground, not the sky.

frequency.shadow_desc: The weight of the past pressing on the mind; the loop of 'why did this happen?'; mental suffering.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to turn the lead of trauma into the gold of wisdom; the 'Aha!' moment that dissolves the weight.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The painting becomes the painter; the total rewriting of the past into a holy scripture.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Pressure Chamber. A physical sensation of heaviness in the head. It feels like wearing a tight helmet. This is the brain trying to crush coal into diamonds.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Migraine of Meaning. Physical head pain from trying to solve an unresolvable past event.
A.micro_correction: Head Massage. Physically release the scalp. Tell the brain: 'The pressure is necessary, but I can control the valve.'

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Confessor. People dump their trauma on you because you have the machinery to process it. You bond by making sense of their pain.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Garbage Can. Taking on everyone's darkness and forgetting to empty the bin. Depression by osmosis.
B.micro_correction: Return to Sender. After processing, give the wisdom back and detach from the pain. 'I see your pattern, but I do not hold your grief.'

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Abstract Synthesis. The mind that looks at a scrambled image and suddenly sees the face. You make sense out of chaos.
C.shadow_manifestation: Confusion Loop. Staring at the chaos and panicking because the image hasn't formed yet. Futile thinking.
C.micro_correction: Wait for the Click. You cannot force the epiphany. Walk away. The synthesis happens when you are not looking.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Sense-Maker. You provide the collective with the 'Why.' You rewrite the history books to show the hidden meaning.
D.shadow_manifestation: Revisionist History. Lying about the past to make it look pretty. Spiritual bypassing of the tragedy.
D.micro_correction: Honor the Lead. Do not pretend the lead is gold. Admit it was heavy, *then* show how it made you strong.

frequency.shadow_desc: The fear that you do not know enough; the bottomless pit of needing more credentials before you act.
frequency.gift_desc: The trust that the solution is not in the book, but in the well; accessing wisdom in the moment.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The knowing that requires no knowledge; the direct link to the Akashic source.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Black Hole. A physical sensation of emptiness in the core. It feels like hunger, but food doesn't fix it. It is the depth waiting to be filled with skill.
A.shadow_manifestation: Frozen Fear. The deer in the headlights. The body locks up because it feels unprepared for the threat.
A.micro_correction: Drop a Stone. Visualize dropping a stone into your own belly. Listen for the splash. Remind the body: 'The well is deep.'

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Taste-Maker. You bond through aesthetic and depth. You show love by sharing the 'good stuff'—the best wine, the deep conversation.
B.shadow_manifestation: Snobbery. Using your depth to make others feel shallow. Withholding validation.
B.micro_correction: Share the Source. Do not just show off the water; show them how to lower the bucket. Invite them into the depth.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Deep Logic. The mind that drills down. You are not satisfied with the surface answer. You want the root cause.
C.shadow_manifestation: Over-Preparation. Studying for 10 years for a job you could learn in 10 days. Using learning as a defense against doing.
C.micro_correction: The 5-Minute Rule. You know enough. Start. The rest of the knowledge is found in the application.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Source. You are a resource for the tribe. People come to you to draw water. You hold the solutions to the community's problems.
D.shadow_manifestation: Dry Well. Giving water when you are empty. Resenting the thirsty.
D.micro_correction: Cap the Well. 'The well is closed for maintenance.' You must refill your own depth before you serve.

frequency.shadow_desc: The knee-jerk emotional rejection of anything different; cutting people off out of fear rather than principle.
frequency.gift_desc: The burning need to change the system for the higher good; the ability to reject the corrupt to make space for the new.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The shedding of the old skin without violence; the realization that death is just a costume change.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Rejection Reflex. Your body physically repels what isn't right. You get nausea, rashes, or sudden heat when you are in a compromised environment. It is a biological 'No.'
A.shadow_manifestation: Allergies/Intolerance. The body attacking itself because it cannot purge the environment. Chronic inflammation.
A.micro_correction: Trust the Nausea. Do not eat it. Do not date it. If the body says 'No,' the mind cannot negotiate a 'Yes.'

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Gatekeeper. You decide who comes in and who stays out. You bond through principles. 'If you share my values, you are family. If not, you are a stranger.'
B.shadow_manifestation: The Butcher. Cutting people out of your life abruptly and cruelly. The 'Door Slam' without explanation.
B.micro_correction: The Exit Interview. You can end the relationship without dehumanizing the person. State the principle, not the insult.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Principled Logic. The mind that organizes society. 'We need food, we need shelter, we need God.' You structure the needs of the tribe.
C.shadow_manifestation: Fundamentalism. Rigid adherence to the rulebook. Killing the spirit of the law to save the letter of the law.
C.micro_correction: Update the Code. Principles must evolve. Ask: 'Does this rule still serve the people, or just the rule-maker?'

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Reformer. You are here to topple the tyrant. You carry the frequency of the 'New Deal.' You reset the social contract.
D.shadow_manifestation: Anarchy. Burning the village to save it. Revolution without a plan for what comes after.
D.micro_correction: Build the Ark. Before you flood the world, make sure you have a boat. Constructive revolution.

frequency.shadow_desc: The decay of values to serve the ego; changing the rules to benefit the self at the expense of the tribe.
frequency.gift_desc: The balancing of ingredients to create a healthy society; the maintenance of the values that ensure survival.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The celestial music of the spheres; the state where human law aligns perfectly with Cosmic Law.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Immune Constitution. You are the standard for health. If you are sick, the tribe is sick. Your body creates the antibodies for the collective.
A.shadow_manifestation: Toxic Overload. Absorbing the corruption of the environment until your own system fails. Compromised immunity.
A.micro_correction: The Purge. You need regular detox protocols. Fasting, sweating, silence. Clean the filter.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Parent. Regardless of age, you take the role of the responsible one. You protect the vulnerable. You bond by providing safety.
B.shadow_manifestation: Over-Responsibility. Carrying the partner like a child. Resenting the weight of the backpack.
B.micro_correction: Put the Child Down. You are a partner, not a parent. They must walk on their own feet.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Legislative Intelligence. The mind that understands consequence. 'If we do X, Y will happen.' You are the keeper of the karmic law.
C.shadow_manifestation: Judgmentalism. Using the law to punish rather than protect. The strict warden.
C.micro_correction: Mercy is Part of the Law. Rigid laws break; flexible laws endure. Add a 'Mercy Clause' to your judgments.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Weaver of Fate. You hold the cauldron where the new values are cooked. You decide what the future will care about.
D.shadow_manifestation: Maintaining the Rot. Keeping a corrupt system alive because you are afraid of the chaos of change.
D.micro_correction: Tip the Cauldron. If the soup is poisoned, pour it out. Start a new broth.

frequency.shadow_desc: The anxiety of the ego trying to control the uncontrollable; using shock to create drama; competitiveness.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to use shock to wake people up; the courage to leap into the void first.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that you were never asleep; the thunderbolt that obliterates the illusion of separation.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Jolt. Your biology needs intensity. You wake up sluggish unless shocked. You thrive on cold plunges, loud music, and sudden sprints.
A.shadow_manifestation: Adrenal Burnout. Living in 'Fight or Flight' permanently. The heart racing for no reason. Anxiety attacks.
A.micro_correction: Controlled Shock. Do not wait for life to shock you. Shock yourself. Cold shower. Sprint. Discharge the static.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Competitor. You bond through contest. 'I bet I can beat you to that tree.' You respect the person who can withstand your impact.
B.shadow_manifestation: Cruelty. Shocking the partner just to get a reaction. Winning the argument but losing the heart.
B.micro_correction: Play Fair. Competition is healthy if it elevates both. 'Iron sharpens iron.' Do not break the other blade.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The First Mover. The mind that jumps the gun. You have the idea before anyone else. You are the pioneer.
C.shadow_manifestation: Impatience. Starting before you are ready. Leaping off the cliff without a parachute.
C.micro_correction: Check the Landing. You have the initiation energy, but do you have the sustenance? (Check RC27/RC3).

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Shamanic Strike. You are the lightning rod. You bring the sudden events that alter destiny. You are the agent of chaos/order.
D.shadow_manifestation: Destructive Chaos. Creating disasters because you are bored. The arsonist.
D.micro_correction: Aim the Bolt. Lightning is power. Use it to restart a heart, not to burn down a house.

frequency.shadow_desc: The pressure to act when it is not time; the vibration of fear trapped in the body; inability to be still.
frequency.gift_desc: The power to hold the energy back until the perfect moment; the focus of the laser beam.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The cosmic pause; the point of absolute rest around which the entire universe spins.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Anchor. Your body is designed to sit. When you stop moving, your power grows. You are a battery that charges in stillness.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Fidget. Physical agitation. Tapping feet, shaking legs. This is the root pressure leaking out.
A.micro_correction: Statue Mode. Sit comfortably. Do not move a muscle for 5 minutes. Let the pressure build. Do not leak it.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Rock. You bond by being the stable one. When everyone is panicking, you are calm. You offer grounding.
B.shadow_manifestation: Stonewalling. Using silence as a weapon. Shutting down emotionally and refusing to engage.
B.micro_correction: Speak from the Mountain. You can be still and still be present. 'I am listening, I am just processing.'

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Deep Focus. The mind that can look at one thing for 10 hours. You see the detail in the detail.
C.shadow_manifestation: Stuckness. Getting locked on the wrong problem. Obsessing over a detail that doesn't matter.
C.micro_correction: Zoom Out. The Mountain sees the whole valley. Lift your eyes from the rock to the horizon.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Buddha Field. Your stillness is contagious. You calm the room just by entering it.
D.shadow_manifestation: Disconnection. Being so 'zen' that you lack empathy for human struggle. Spiritual aloofness.
D.micro_correction: Compassionate Stillness. Do not rise above the pain; sit *with* the pain. Be the mountain that holds the storm.

frequency.shadow_desc: The addiction to starting without the will to finish; escaping the hard work of the middle by jumping to a new beginning.
frequency.gift_desc: The pressure to evolve through cycles; the ability to lay the perfect foundation for growth.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that life is infinite initiation; the end of linear time and the entry into eternal unfolding.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Ignition Key. Your body is built to start things. You feel a massive surge of adrenal power at the beginning of any project. If you are denied a fresh start, you physically stagnate.
A.shadow_manifestation: Chronic Starting. Lighting a thousand fires but never cooking the meal. Leaving a trail of half-finished projects and exhausted adrenals.
A.micro_correction: Close the Loop. Before you start the new thing, you must ritualistically kill the old thing. Do not overlap. Finish or delete.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Spark of Romance. You bond through the 'New Relationship Energy.' You are addicted to the first kiss, the first date, the potential.
B.shadow_manifestation: Flight Risk. Running away as soon as the relationship gets 'real' or boring. Constant turnover of partners.
B.micro_correction: Deepen the Cycle. Instead of a new partner, start a new *chapter* with the same partner. Initiate a new shared mission.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Developmental Logic. The mind that sees life as a series of levels. 'I am at Level 1, I need to get to Level 2.' You understand the steps of growth.
C.shadow_manifestation: Impatience. Trying to skip from Level 1 to Level 10. Frustration that the tree doesn't grow faster.
C.micro_correction: Trust the Middle. The growth happens in the boring middle part. Fall in love with the plateau.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The World Builder. You start institutions, movements, and eras. You plant seeds that will become forests long after you are gone.
D.shadow_manifestation: Abandonment. Starting a movement and then abandoning the followers when it gets hard.
D.micro_correction: Pass the Torch. If you must leave, appoint a successor (RC42). Ensure the cycle continues without you.

frequency.shadow_desc: The desperate need to be 'more' than you are; using others as rungs on a ladder; spiritual or material materialism.
frequency.gift_desc: The healthy drive to transform base energy into higher consciousness; the fuel for success and enlightenment.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The alchemical sublimation of the ego into light; the ladder disappears because you have become the sky.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Turbine. Your root center produces massive upward pressure. It feels like a rocket engine strapped to your spine. You *must* rise physically, socially, or spiritually.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Heart Attack. Pushing the biology too hard to 'make it.' Sacrificing the body for the bank account.
A.micro_correction: Fuel Check. Are you burning clean fuel (inspiration) or dirty fuel (insecurity)? If dirty, the engine will explode.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Networker. You bond upwards. You instinctively seek partners who can elevate you. This is not cold; it is an evolutionary drive to improve your station.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Gold Digger. Valuing the partner only for their status or resources. Transactional intimacy.
B.micro_correction: Bring Value. If you want to marry the King/Queen, you must be worthy of the throne. Focus on your contribution, not just the capture.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Strategic Ambition. The mind that maps the hierarchy. 'Who holds the power? How do I get there?' You understand the game of thrones.
C.shadow_manifestation: Machiavellianism. Viewing life as a zero-sum game. 'I must win, so you must lose.'
C.micro_correction: Win-Win Ascension. Real power comes from lifting others as you climb. Build a team, not a pile of corpses.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Seeker. The highest octave of greed is the greed for God. You want to conquer the spiritual realm. You are the yogi who storms the gates of heaven.
D.shadow_manifestation: Spiritual Materialism. Collecting gurus and initiations like trophies. The 'Ego' wearing a turban.
D.micro_correction: Surrender the Goal. You cannot conquer God; you can only surrender to Him. Drop the ambition at the altar.

frequency.shadow_desc: The belief that your mood is caused by the world; drowning in the emotional wave; complaining as a lifestyle.
frequency.gift_desc: The realization that the mood is internal weather; the ability to create your own emotional reality regardless of circumstance.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The final liberation from the binary of pleasure and pain; the spirit dancing purely for the joy of the dance.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Emotional Barometer. Your body is a musical instrument played by your moods. When you are low, you are physically heavy. When high, you are weightless. You cannot 'fake' energy.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Melancholic Crash. Deep, unexplained sadness that feels physical. Eating or sleeping to numb the wave.
A.micro_correction: Honor the Low. Do not medicate the sadness. It is the 'winter' of the spirit. Rest, write poetry, and wait for spring.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Muse. You bond through high romance. You inspire the partner to see the beauty in the world. You bring the magic.
B.shadow_manifestation: The Drama Queen/King. Making the partner responsible for your happiness. 'You made me feel this way.'
B.micro_correction: Own Your Wave. Say: 'I am feeling low right now. It is not your fault. I just need time.' Liberate the partner.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Poetic Intelligence. The mind that understands that abundance is a feeling, not a number. You see the richness in a sunset that a billionaire misses.
C.shadow_manifestation: Impracticality. Refusing to deal with money or logistics because it 'kills the vibe.' Starving artist syndrome.
C.micro_correction: Structure supports Spirit. You need a cup to hold the wine. Discipline allows freedom to flourish.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Avatar of Freedom. You show the world what it looks like to be unchained by circumstance. You are happy in a prison cell or a palace.
D.shadow_manifestation: Anarchy. Confusing freedom with lack of responsibility. 'I do what I want.'
D.micro_correction: Internal Freedom. True freedom is the inability to be disturbed. Work on the inner lock, not the outer door.

frequency.shadow_desc: The addiction to new stimuli to avoid the silence; skimming the surface of life; the 'shiny object' syndrome.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to gather diverse experiences and weave them into a unified story that uplifts the listener.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that life itself is the story of God; getting drunk on the divine play of existence.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Nomad's Feet. Your biology needs movement. If you stay in one place/routine too long, your throat tightens and your eyes go dead. You digest life through your eyes.
A.shadow_manifestation: ADD/ADHD Symptoms. The brain refusing to focus on the boring. Physical agitation from lack of stimulation.
A.micro_correction: Visual Diet. Change your view. Go for a walk. Look at something new. The brain needs new input to reboot.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Raconteur. You bond by telling stories. You are the life of the party. You teach through metaphor and myth.
B.shadow_manifestation: Exaggeration. Lying to make the story better. Being entertaining but untrustworthy.
B.micro_correction: Truth in the Tale. You can use metaphor without lying about the facts. Keep the core true.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The Synthesizer. The mind that collects trivia, facts, and experiences and connects them into a web of meaning. The ultimate generalist.
C.shadow_manifestation: Superficiality. Knowing a little bit about everything but mastering nothing. The 'Jack of all trades, master of none.'
C.micro_correction: Connect the Dots. Your mastery is the connection, not the dot. Value your ability to bridge worlds.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Pilgrim. You are not wandering aimlessly; you are on a quest. You travel to find the pieces of your soul.
D.shadow_manifestation: Running Away. Using travel to escape yourself. 'Wherever you go, there you are.'
D.micro_correction: Internal Pilgrimage. Can you find the exotic in your own backyard? The journey is internal.

frequency.shadow_desc: The fear of the future manifesting as a constant, low-level vibration of anxiety; the inability to trust the Now.
frequency.gift_desc: The acoustic clarity that hears the truth before it is spoken; the immediate biological knowing of safety or danger.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The absolute silence where the listener becomes the sound; the dissolution of time into pure knowing.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Acoustic Radar. Your body hears frequencies others miss. A lie physically hurts your ears. Danger sounds like a high-pitched whine. You navigate by sonar.
A.shadow_manifestation: Hyper-Vigilance. Straining to hear the danger. Jumpiness. The nervous system is so tuned it picks up static as a threat.
A.micro_correction: Tune Out. If the signal is too loud, put on noise-canceling headphones. You need acoustic rest to reset the radar.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Truth Detector. You bond by hearing what the other person *isn't* saying. You respond to their tone, not their words.
B.shadow_manifestation: Paranoia. Misinterpreting a tone shift as a betrayal. 'I know you're lying' when they are just tired.
B.micro_correction: Verify the Signal. 'I am hearing hesitation in your voice; is that true?' Check the data before reacting.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Instant Knowing. The mind that skips the math. You know the answer immediately, but you cannot explain *how*.
C.shadow_manifestation: Doubt. Letting the logical mind talk you out of your intuition. 'That doesn't make sense.' (Intuition never makes sense initially).
C.micro_correction: Act First, Explain Later. If the spleen says 'Go,' go. Do not wait for the brain to catch up.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Wind. You are soft but penetrating. Your presence enters people's defenses like a gentle breeze. You change them without them noticing.
D.shadow_manifestation: Invasiveness. Entering spaces where you were not invited. Using your intuition to pry.
D.micro_correction: Knock First. Even the wind must respect the window. Ask permission before reading someone's soul.

frequency.shadow_desc: The constant focus on what is missing or broken; the loss of the joy of living in the pursuit of the perfect.
frequency.gift_desc: The joyous energy to improve the world; the uncontainable life force that challenges authority to serve the people.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that perfection is not a destination but the nature of the moment itself.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Life Force. Your body wants to *live*. It craves taste, touch, speed, and laughter. When you repress this zest, you get bitter and exhausted.
A.shadow_manifestation: The Critic. Using your energy to point out flaws. 'This food is cold.' 'This movie is bad.' The joy turns into acid.
A.micro_correction: Correct to Serve. Only point out the flaw if you are willing to fix it. If you won't fix it, shut up and eat.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Spark. You bring the party. You bond by challenging the partner to be more alive. You hate stagnation.
B.shadow_manifestation: Nagging. Pressuring the partner to change because *you* are bored. 'Why don't we ever do anything?'
B.micro_correction: Be the Event. Do not wait for them to entertain you. Start the dance. They will join if the rhythm is good.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Critical Logic. The mind that sees the defect in the pattern. You are the engineer who spots the weak bridge support.
C.shadow_manifestation: Cynicism. Believing that because nothing is perfect, everything is garbage.
C.micro_correction: The Ratio of Joy. For every flaw you find, find one miracle. Balance the equation.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Healer of the Collective. You see what is making society sick, and you have the energy to fight for the cure.
D.shadow_manifestation: Bitter Crusader. Fighting the system with hate. You become the toxicity you are trying to heal.
D.micro_correction: Joyful Rebellion. Fight the system by having more fun than they do. Joy is the ultimate resistance.

frequency.shadow_desc: Hiding the true self to gain acceptance or intimacy; the manipulation of the aura to trap a mate.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to break down the barriers between self and other; the courage to let the aura penetrate.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The clear pane of glass where the Creator looks through the eyes of the creature; no secrets, no walls.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Fertile Body. Your biology is designed to reproduce (ideas, children, projects). You have a penetrating aura that physically enters the space of others.
A.shadow_manifestation: Invasive Energy. People step back from you because your aura feels 'too close.' Unconscious sexual projection.
A.micro_correction: Retract the Field. Visualise pulling your aura in to arm's length. Give people room to breathe.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Icebreaker. You destroy barriers. You can turn a stranger into a lover/friend in 10 minutes. You bond by dissolving walls.
B.shadow_manifestation: Promiscuity (Energetic). Opening everyone up but committing to no one. Leaving a trail of open, vulnerable people.
B.micro_correction: Seal the Wound. If you open someone up, you are responsible for closing the surgery. Do not leave them bleeding.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Genetic Strategy. The mind that knows how to mix ingredients. 'If I mix A and B, I get C.' The alchemist of union.
C.shadow_manifestation: Calculated Intimacy. Planning the seduction rather than feeling it. Strategy killing romance.
C.micro_correction: Drop the Plan. Let the chemistry dictate the reaction. You are the element, not the scientist.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Global Union. You see humanity as one gene pool. You break down racial, tribal, and national walls.
D.shadow_manifestation: Homogenization. Wanting everyone to be the same to avoid conflict. Erasing difference.
D.micro_correction: Unity in Diversity. The rainbow needs different colors. Do not mix them into gray.

frequency.shadow_desc: The feeling of being trapped by form, time, or circumstance; the rage against the cage.
frequency.gift_desc: The acceptance of the container; understanding that without the banks, the river is just a swamp; magic through structure.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The perfect balance of form and emptiness; the realization that the limitation *is* the liberation.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Pulse. Your energy is not a stream; it is a pulse. On/Off. You have periods of total stillness and bursts of mutation. You are biological Morse Code.
A.shadow_manifestation: Depression in the Gap. When the pulse is 'Off,' you think you are broken. You try to force the energy and burn out.
A.micro_correction: Wait for the Beat. When you are off, rest. Do not panic. The pulse *always* returns. Trust the rhythm.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Anchor. You provide the container for the relationship. 'These are the rules; this is the boundary.' You bond by defining the space.
B.shadow_manifestation: Rigidity. Being so strict with the rules that the love suffocates. The jailer.
B.micro_correction: Soft Walls. The container should be bamboo, not steel. Strong enough to hold, flexible enough to bend.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Structural Logic. The mind that sees the necessary step. 'We cannot build the roof until we pour the foundation.' You respect the order of operations.
C.shadow_manifestation: Pessimism. 'It can't be done.' Seeing the wall but not the door.
C.micro_correction: The Constraint is the Muse. Use the limitation to be creative. 'How do we build it *within* the budget?'

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Time Keeper. You hold the frequency of the 'Age.' You ensure that mutation happens only when the time is right.
D.shadow_manifestation: Holding Back Evolution. Refusing to let the old age die. Fear of the new pulse.
D.micro_correction: Open the Gate. When the pressure is high enough, let the dam break. Be the midwife of the new time.

frequency.shadow_desc: The mind breaking under the pressure of the unknown; the desperate need to know 'Why?' turning into delusion.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to channel the unknowable into music, art, or thought; making the divine accessible.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that the Mystery is not a problem to be solved, but a presence to be inhabited.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Pineal Throb. Your head is under constant acoustic pressure. It feels like a radio tuning between stations. You physically need silence to process the download.
A.shadow_manifestation: Headaches/Migraines. The result of trying to force the mystery into a logical box. The brain overheats.
A.micro_correction: Dark Room Therapy. Remove all light and sound. Lie flat. Let the pressure equalize without trying to understand it.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Muse. You bond by sharing the unexplainable. You are drawn to partners who tolerate your weirdness and your sudden silences.
B.shadow_manifestation: Disassociation. checking out of the relationship because the inner world is more interesting than the partner.
B.micro_correction: Bridge the Gap. 'I am visiting the mystery right now; I will return to you in 10 minutes.' Signal your departure.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Occult Knowledge. The mind that seeks the hidden truth. You love conspiracies, metaphysics, and the unknown. You peel back the curtain.
C.shadow_manifestation: Delusion. Believing your own fantasy is objective truth. Losing the tether to consensus reality.
C.micro_correction: Ground the Truth. Can you explain your insight to a 5-year-old? If not, it is still just noise.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Universal Mind. You realize that 'your' thoughts are not yours. You are an antenna for the cosmic broadcast.
D.shadow_manifestation: God Complex. Thinking *you* are the source of the wisdom, rather than just the radio.
D.micro_correction: Clean the Antenna. You are the instrument, not the music. Stay humble to keep the signal clear.

frequency.shadow_desc: Using facts as a defense mechanism; obsessing over details to avoid feeling the emotion.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to name the thing exactly; the use of language to unlock understanding for others.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The perfect alignment of thought, word, and deed; the state where language creates reality.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Detail Eye. Your eyes physically lock onto the anomaly. You see the typo, the loose thread, the mismatch. Your biology demands accuracy.
A.shadow_manifestation: Nervous Tics. Physical agitation when things are 'messy' or undefined. Picking at skin/nails.
A.micro_correction: Name It to Tame It. If you feel anxiety, label it precisely. 'I am feeling 12% anxious about the deadline.' Specificity calms you.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Explainer. You bond by clarifying. You help the partner understand their own feelings by giving them the right words.
B.shadow_manifestation: Pedantry. Correcting the partner's grammar or facts during a fight. Using logic to invalidate feeling.
B.micro_correction: Heart over Fact. 'You are factually wrong, but emotionally right.' Validate the emotion first.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Strategic Planning. The mind that breaks the big dream into small, executable steps. You are the bridge between the vision and the reality.
C.shadow_manifestation: Analysis Paralysis. Getting stuck in the details and forgetting the goal. Organizing the files but never doing the work.
C.micro_correction: The Good Enough Rule. Perfection is the enemy of done. Set a timer. When it rings, ship it.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Scribe. You are the keeper of the sacred text. You ensure that the wisdom is preserved exactly as it was given.
D.shadow_manifestation: Dogma. Worshipping the text and ignoring the spirit. Killing the heretic for a typo.
D.micro_correction: The Spirit breathes. The text is the map, not the territory. Honor the map, walk the land.

frequency.shadow_desc: The self-destructive questioning that paralyzes action; suspicion of self and others.
frequency.gift_desc: The healthy skepticism that tests the pattern to ensure it is true; the question that opens the door.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The end of the question; the silence of absolute knowing where doubt is impossible.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Question Engine. Your brain is a logic grinder. It physically churns. If you don't give it a problem to solve, it will eat *you*.
A.shadow_manifestation: Anxiety Loop. The brain turning on the self. 'Did I do that right? What if I failed?' Physical insomnia.
A.micro_correction: Give the Brain a Bone. Do a puzzle. Read a complex book. Direct the grinder outward, not inward.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Critical Partner. You bond by testing the relationship. 'Do you really love me?' You need proof.
B.shadow_manifestation: Suspicion. constant interrogation. eroding trust by demanding endless reassurance.
B.micro_correction: Assume the Best. For one week, assume their intentions are pure. See what happens to the energy.

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: The Scientific Method. You do not believe; you verify. You are the immune system of the collective mind, killing bad ideas.
C.shadow_manifestation: Cynicism. Refusing to believe anything good. 'It's too good to be true.'
C.micro_correction: Test for Truth, not Failure. Look for evidence that it *works*, not just evidence that it fails.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Logic of the Future. You see the flaw in the plan before it happens. You save the future by correcting the present.
D.shadow_manifestation: Fatalism. 'It's flawed, so we are doomed.'
D.micro_correction: The Fixer. Don't just spot the flaw; design the patch. Be constructive.

frequency.shadow_desc: The chaos of unorganized images; the inability to distinguish between the past, present, and future.
frequency.gift_desc: The ability to organize the chaos into a narrative; thinking in pictures; the artist's mind.
frequency.siddhi_desc: The realization that you are the light projecting the movie; the dreamer waking up within the dream.

A.title: SOMATIC
A.description: The Image Storm. Your brain thinks in holograms, not words. You receive packets of data that are dense and non-linear. It feels like a 'flash' in the back of the head.
A.shadow_manifestation: Mental Vertigo. Overwhelmed by the speed of the images. Inability to speak because the words are too slow for the pictures.
A.micro_correction: Draw It. Do not speak. Sketch, paint, or diagram. Bypass the language center.

B.title: RELATIONAL
B.description: The Nostalgic. You bond through shared memory. You keep the photo albums. You connect the past to the future.
B.shadow_manifestation: Living in the Past. Missing the person in front of you because you are remembering who they were 10 years ago.
B.micro_correction: Update the File. Look at them NOW. 'I see you as you are today.'

C.title: COGNITIVE
C.description: Abstract Synthesis. The mind that connects the unconnected. You see the pattern in the chaos. You are the poet of probability.
C.shadow_manifestation: Incoherence. Speaking in riddles. Making sense to yourself but sounding crazy to others.
C.micro_correction: The Metaphor Bridge. Use 'It is like...' to help others cross the bridge to your abstraction.

D.title: TRANSPERSONAL
D.description: The Universal Eye. You see the completion of the cycle before it begins. You hold the vision of the Omega point.
D.shadow_manifestation: Giving Up. 'I've seen the end, so why play the game?'
D.micro_correction: Play for the Joy. The ending is written, but the acting is unwritten. Enjoy the performance.
